ABCD_SubMod_DataPrep

Felicia Hardi

2025-07-24

Load packages

library(broom)
library(cluster)
library(dplyr)
library(factoextra)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(grid)
library(Hmisc)
library(kableExtra)
library(knitr)
library(magrittr)
library(NbClust)
library(psych)
library(purrr)
library(table1)
library(tidyverse)
library(viridis)

Environmental factors

CRPBI

### CRPBI - youth reported parenting of primary & secondary caregivers ; 1-3 scale items ; higher score = warmer parenting
crpbi_y = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/culture-environment/ce_y_crpbi.csv") 
psych::describe(crpbi_y)
##                         vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min
## src_subject_id*            1 43408 5930.82 3431.94 5925.5 5930.32 4411.48   1
## eventname*                 2 43408    3.02    1.54    3.0    3.02    2.97   1
## crpbi_parent1_y            3 38112    2.74    0.49    3.0    2.83    0.00   1
## crpbi_parent2_y            4 38111    2.74    0.48    3.0    2.83    0.00   1
## crpbi_parent3_y            5 38109    2.74    0.50    3.0    2.83    0.00   1
## crpbi_parent4_y            6 38109    2.92    0.29    3.0    3.00    0.00   1
## crpbi_parent5_y            7 38107    2.60    0.57    3.0    2.68    0.00   1
## crpbi_caregiver1_y         8 38098    0.91    0.28    1.0    1.00    0.00   0
## crpbi_caregiver2_y         9 34831    2.39    1.35    2.0    2.11    0.00   1
## crpbi_caregiver12_y       10 34830    2.65    0.55    3.0    2.74    0.00   1
## crpbi_caregiver13_y       11 34831    2.69    0.53    3.0    2.79    0.00   1
## crpbi_caregiver14_y       12 34829    2.69    0.54    3.0    2.78    0.00   1
## crpbi_caregiver15_y       13 34829    2.88    0.36    3.0    2.98    0.00   1
## crpbi_caregiver16_y       14 34826    2.58    0.60    3.0    2.67    0.00   1
## crpbi_studycaregiver_id   15 20642    1.15    0.51    1.0    1.02    0.00   1
## crpbi_y_ss_parent         16 38110    2.75    0.34    2.8    2.82    0.30   1
## crpbi_y_ss_parent_nm      17 43408    0.61    1.64    0.0    0.14    0.00   0
## crpbi_y_ss_parent_nt      18 43408    5.00    0.00    5.0    5.00    0.00   5
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver      19 34831    2.70    0.38    2.8    2.77    0.30   1
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver_nm   20 38178    0.44    1.41    0.0    0.00    0.00   0
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver_nt   21 38178    5.00    0.00    5.0    5.00    0.00   5
##                           max range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*         11868 11867  0.00    -1.20 16.47
## eventname*                  5     4 -0.01    -1.43  0.01
## crpbi_parent1_y             3     2 -1.68     1.93  0.00
## crpbi_parent2_y             3     2 -1.65     1.80  0.00
## crpbi_parent3_y             3     2 -1.68     1.94  0.00
## crpbi_parent4_y             3     2 -3.84    15.16  0.00
## crpbi_parent5_y             3     2 -1.11     0.23  0.00
## crpbi_caregiver1_y          1     1 -2.96     6.76  0.00
## crpbi_caregiver2_y          7     6  2.38     5.16  0.01
## crpbi_caregiver12_y         3     2 -1.32     0.76  0.00
## crpbi_caregiver13_y         3     2 -1.54     1.44  0.00
## crpbi_caregiver14_y         3     2 -1.49     1.29  0.00
## crpbi_caregiver15_y         3     2 -2.92     8.28  0.00
## crpbi_caregiver16_y         3     2 -1.09     0.16  0.00
## crpbi_studycaregiver_id     7     6  5.90    50.53  0.00
## crpbi_y_ss_parent           3     2 -1.73     3.17  0.00
## crpbi_y_ss_parent_nm        5     5  2.31     3.33  0.01
## crpbi_y_ss_parent_nt        5     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver        3     2 -1.54     2.29  0.00
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver_nm     5     5  2.92     6.50  0.01
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver_nt     5     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
# create a new summary df with vars of interest
crpbi_y_ss = crpbi_y %>% filter(!(eventname=="4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) %>%
  filter(!(eventname=="3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) %>%
  select(src_subject_id, eventname, crpbi_y_ss_parent, crpbi_y_ss_caregiver) # mean; min 4 answered 
# transpose to wide format so we can collapse data across time
crpbi_y_ss = reshape(crpbi_y_ss, idvar="src_subject_id", timevar="eventname", direction="wide")
psych::describe(crpbi_y_ss)
## Warning in FUN(newX[, i], ...): no non-missing arguments to min; returning Inf
## Warning in FUN(newX[, i], ...): no non-missing arguments to min; returning Inf
## Warning in FUN(newX[, i], ...): no non-missing arguments to max; returning -Inf
## Warning in FUN(newX[, i], ...): no non-missing arguments to max; returning -Inf
##                                               vars     n    mean      sd median
## src_subject_id*                                  1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.5
## crpbi_y_ss_parent.baseline_year_1_arm_1          2 11834    2.78    0.30    2.8
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver.baseline_year_1_arm_1       3 10953    2.69    0.39    2.8
## crpbi_y_ss_parent.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1       4 11207    2.80    0.29    3.0
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    5 10389    2.76    0.33    2.8
## crpbi_y_ss_parent.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1       6     0     NaN      NA     NA
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    7     0     NaN      NA     NA
##                                               trimmed     mad min   max range
## src_subject_id*                               5934.50 4398.87   1 11868 11867
## crpbi_y_ss_parent.baseline_year_1_arm_1          2.84    0.30   1     3     2
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver.baseline_year_1_arm_1       2.76    0.30   1     3     2
## crpbi_y_ss_parent.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1       2.86    0.00   1     3     2
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    2.83    0.30   1     3     2
## crpbi_y_ss_parent.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1        NaN      NA Inf  -Inf  -Inf
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1     NaN      NA Inf  -Inf  -Inf
##                                                skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*                                0.00    -1.20 31.45
## crpbi_y_ss_parent.baseline_year_1_arm_1       -1.82     3.91  0.00
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver.baseline_year_1_arm_1    -1.48     2.02  0.00
## crpbi_y_ss_parent.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    -1.89     4.03  0.00
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 -1.76     3.44  0.00
## crpbi_y_ss_parent.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1       NA       NA    NA
## crpbi_y_ss_caregiver.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    NA       NA    NA
crpbi_y_ss$crpbi = rowMeans(crpbi_y_ss[2:7], na.rm=T) # collapse across all timepoints and caregivers
# create df with variable for merge
crpbi = crpbi_y_ss %>% select(src_subject_id, crpbi)
psych::describe(crpbi)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.5 5934.50 4398.87   1 11868
## crpbi              2 11859    2.76    0.24    2.8    2.79    0.22   1     3
##                 range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11867  0.00    -1.20 31.45
## crpbi               2 -1.38     2.43  0.00

PM

### PM - youth reported parental monitoring; 1-5 scale items ; higher score = more monitoring
pm_p = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/culture-environment/ce_p_pm.csv") # only collected at 4yr f/u
psych::describe(pm_p)
##                          vars    n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad  min
## src_subject_id*             1 4665 2333.00 1346.81 2333.0 2333.00 1728.71 1.00
## eventname*                  2 4665    1.00    0.00    1.0    1.00    0.00 1.00
## pm_p_select_language___1    3 4665    0.06    0.23    0.0    0.00    0.00 0.00
## parental_monitor_q1_p       4 4665    2.72   27.80    2.0    1.63    1.48 1.00
## parental_monitor_q2_p       5 4665   10.91   84.46    1.0    1.51    0.00 1.00
## parental_monitor_q3_p       6 4665    5.17   48.05    2.0    2.09    1.48 1.00
## parental_monitor_q4_p       7 4665    2.70   32.10    1.0    1.26    0.00 1.00
## parental_monitor_q5_p       8 4665    3.71   35.86    2.0    1.95    1.48 1.00
## parental_monitor_q6_p       9 4665    6.16   59.91    1.0    1.36    0.00 1.00
## parental_monitor_q7_p      10 4665    4.23   45.34    1.0    1.46    0.00 1.00
## parental_monitor_q8_p      11 4665   57.47  201.12    1.0    1.23    0.00 1.00
## parental_monitor_q9_p      12 4665    7.51   75.95    0.0    0.00    0.00 0.00
## parental_monitor_q10_p     13 4665    5.27   55.51    1.0    1.18    0.00 1.00
## parental_monitor_ss_mean   14 4651    1.46    0.41    1.4    1.43    0.44 0.86
##                              max   range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*          4665.00 4664.00  0.00    -1.20 19.72
## eventname*                  1.00    0.00   NaN      NaN  0.00
## pm_p_select_language___1    1.00    1.00  3.80    12.46  0.00
## parental_monitor_q1_p     777.00  776.00 27.79   771.09  0.41
## parental_monitor_q2_p     777.00  776.00  8.96    78.27  1.24
## parental_monitor_q3_p     777.00  776.00 15.99   253.83  0.70
## parental_monitor_q4_p     777.00  776.00 24.06   577.44  0.47
## parental_monitor_q5_p     777.00  776.00 21.50   460.63  0.53
## parental_monitor_q6_p     777.00  776.00 12.78   161.49  0.88
## parental_monitor_q7_p     777.00  776.00 16.98   286.31  0.66
## parental_monitor_q8_p     777.00  776.00  3.30     8.87  2.94
## parental_monitor_q9_p     777.00  777.00 10.03    98.63  1.11
## parental_monitor_q10_p    777.00  776.00 13.83   189.26  0.81
## parental_monitor_ss_mean    3.88    3.02  0.87     1.12  0.01
pm_p = pm_p %>% filter(!(eventname=="4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) %>% 
  filter(!(eventname=="3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) 
pm_y = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/culture-environment/ce_y_pm.csv")
psych::describe(pm_y)
##                        vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min
## src_subject_id*           1 49151 5931.30 3430.60 5928.0 5931.60 4406.29   1
## eventname*                2 49151    2.90    1.48    3.0    2.87    1.48   1
## parent_monitor_q1_y       3 49067    4.75    0.52    5.0    4.85    0.00   1
## parent_monitor_q2_y       4 49065    4.66    0.70    5.0    4.81    0.00   1
## parent_monitor_q3_y       5 49066    4.68    0.70    5.0    4.84    0.00   1
## parent_monitor_q4_y       6 49067    3.87    1.10    4.0    4.01    1.48   1
## parent_monitor_q5_y       7 49067    4.21    1.01    5.0    4.37    0.00   1
## parental_monitor_admin    8 13545    1.57    0.66    1.0    1.46    0.00   1
## pmq_y_ss_mean             9 49067    4.43    0.49    4.6    4.49    0.30   1
## pmq_y_ss_mean_nm         10 49151    0.01    0.21    0.0    0.00    0.00   0
## pmq_y_ss_mean_nt         11 49151    5.00    0.00    5.0    5.00    0.00   5
##                          max range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*        11868 11867  0.00    -1.20 15.47
## eventname*                 5     4  0.20    -1.34  0.01
## parent_monitor_q1_y        5     4 -2.28     6.36  0.00
## parent_monitor_q2_y        5     4 -2.52     7.56  0.00
## parent_monitor_q3_y        5     4 -2.76     8.84  0.00
## parent_monitor_q4_y        5     4 -0.79    -0.05  0.00
## parent_monitor_q5_y        5     4 -1.16     0.61  0.00
## parental_monitor_admin     3     2  0.75    -0.54  0.01
## pmq_y_ss_mean              5     4 -1.17     1.82  0.00
## pmq_y_ss_mean_nm           5     5 24.06   577.52  0.00
## pmq_y_ss_mean_nt           5     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
pm_y = pm_y %>% filter(!(eventname=="4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) %>% 
  filter(!(eventname=="3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) 
# create a new summary df with vars of interest
pm_py_ss = full_join(pm_p %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, parental_monitor_ss_mean), # mean ; min 7 items answered 
                     pm_y %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, pmq_y_ss_mean)) # mean ; no min number of answers
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id, eventname)`
pm_py_ss = reshape(pm_py_ss, idvar="src_subject_id", timevar="eventname", direction="wide")
psych::describe(pm_py_ss)
## Warning in FUN(newX[, i], ...): no non-missing arguments to min; returning Inf
## Warning in FUN(newX[, i], ...): no non-missing arguments to min; returning Inf
## Warning in FUN(newX[, i], ...): no non-missing arguments to min; returning Inf
## Warning in FUN(newX[, i], ...): no non-missing arguments to max; returning -Inf
## Warning in FUN(newX[, i], ...): no non-missing arguments to max; returning -Inf
## Warning in FUN(newX[, i], ...): no non-missing arguments to max; returning -Inf
##                                                   vars     n    mean      sd
## src_subject_id*                                      1 11868 5934.50 3426.14
## parental_monitor_ss_mean.baseline_year_1_arm_1       2     0     NaN      NA
## pmq_y_ss_mean.baseline_year_1_arm_1                  3 11847    4.38    0.52
## parental_monitor_ss_mean.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    4     0     NaN      NA

## parental_monitor_ss_mean.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    6     0     NaN      NA
## pmq_y_ss_mean.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1               7 10937    4.48    0.47
##                                                   median trimmed     mad min
## src_subject_id*                                   5934.5 5934.50 4398.87   1
## parental_monitor_ss_mean.baseline_year_1_arm_1        NA     NaN      NA Inf
## pmq_y_ss_mean.baseline_year_1_arm_1                  4.4    4.44    0.59   1
## parental_monitor_ss_mean.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1     NA     NaN      NA Inf
## pmq_y_ss_mean.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1               4.6    4.54    0.30   1
## parental_monitor_ss_mean.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1     NA     NaN      NA Inf
## pmq_y_ss_mean.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1               4.6    4.55    0.30   1
##                                                     max range  skew kurtosis
## src_subject_id*                                   11868 11867  0.00    -1.20
## parental_monitor_ss_mean.baseline_year_1_arm_1     -Inf  -Inf    NA       NA
## pmq_y_ss_mean.baseline_year_1_arm_1                   5     4 -1.14     1.62
## parental_monitor_ss_mean.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1  -Inf  -Inf    NA       NA
## pmq_y_ss_mean.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1                5     4 -1.30     2.50
## parental_monitor_ss_mean.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1  -Inf  -Inf    NA       NA
## pmq_y_ss_mean.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1                5     4 -1.31     2.47
##                                                      se
## src_subject_id*                                   31.45
## parental_monitor_ss_mean.baseline_year_1_arm_1       NA
## pmq_y_ss_mean.baseline_year_1_arm_1                0.00

## parental_monitor_ss_mean.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    NA
## pmq_y_ss_mean.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1             0.00
pm_py_ss$pm = rowMeans(pm_py_ss[2:7], na.rm=T) # collapse across informant and time

pm = pm_py_ss %>% select(src_subject_id, pm)
psych::describe(pm)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.50 5934.50 4398.87   1 11868
## pm                 2 11861    4.45    0.39    4.53    4.49    0.40   2     5
##                 range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11867  0.00     -1.2 31.45
## pm                  3 -1.06      1.5  0.00

FES

# FES - youth reported family environment ; binary 0/1 ; 
# six sum scores: conflict/expression/intellectual-cultural/activity-rec/organization/cohesion
# relationship (cohesion, express, conflict); personal growth (int-cultural, act-rec); system (organiz)
# higher scores represent more conflict/expressiveness/int-cultural/activity/org/cohesion
fes_p = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/culture-environment/ce_p_fes.csv") 
psych::describe(fes_p)
##                                vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed
## src_subject_id                    1 49151 5931.30 3430.60   5928 5931.60
## eventname                         2 49151    2.90    1.48      3    2.87

## fes_p_ss_fc                      58 48733    2.43    1.94      2    2.25
## fes_p_ss_fc_na                   59 49151    8.92    0.83      9    9.00

## fes_p_ss_exp_sum_nm               0.00   0     9     9   7.81    58.99  0.01
fes_p = fes_p %>% filter(!(eventname=="4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) %>%
  filter(!(eventname=="3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) 
fes_y = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/culture-environment/ce_y_fes.csv")
psych::describe(fes_y) # only asked for conflict items

## fes_y_ss_fc_na      9 -22.59   509.57  0.00
## fes_y_ss_fc_pr      9   0.98     0.43  0.01
fes_y = fes_y %>% filter(!(eventname=="4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) %>%
  filter(!(eventname=="3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) 
fes_py_ss = full_join(fes_p %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, fes_p_ss_fc, fes_p_ss_exp_sum, fes_p_ss_int_cult_sum, fes_p_ss_act_rec_sum, fes_p_ss_org_sum, fes_p_ss_cohesion_sum), 
                      fes_y %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, fes_y_ss_fc)) # sum ; min 5 items answered
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id, eventname)`
fes_py_ss = reshape(fes_py_ss, idvar="src_subject_id", timevar="eventname", direction="wide")
psych::describe(fes_py_ss)

## fes_p_ss_exp_sum.baseline_year_1_arm_1          -Inf    NA       NA    NA
## fes_p_ss_int_cult_sum.baseline_year_1_arm_1     -Inf    NA       NA    NA
## fes_p_ss_act_rec_sum.baseline_year_1_arm_1      -Inf    NA       NA    NA
## fes_p_ss_org_sum.baseline_year_1_arm_1          -Inf    NA       NA    NA
## fes_p_ss_cohesion_sum.baseline_year_1_arm_1     -Inf    NA       NA    NA
## fes_y_ss_fc.baseline_year_1_arm_1                  9  0.94     0.24  0.02
## fes_p_ss_fc.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1               9  0.65    -0.08  0.02
## fes_p_ss_exp_sum.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1       -Inf    NA       NA    NA
## fes_p_ss_int_cult_sum.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1  -Inf    NA       NA    NA
## fes_p_ss_act_rec_sum.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1   -Inf    NA       NA    NA
## fes_p_ss_org_sum.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1       -Inf    NA       NA    NA
## fes_p_ss_cohesion_sum.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1  -Inf    NA       NA    NA
## fes_y_ss_fc.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1               9  1.04     0.61  0.02
## fes_p_ss_fc.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1               9  0.72    -0.08  0.02
## fes_p_ss_exp_sum.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1          9 -0.60     0.14  0.01
## fes_p_ss_int_cult_sum.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1     9 -0.53    -0.24  0.02
## fes_p_ss_act_rec_sum.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1      9 -0.41    -0.37  0.02
## fes_p_ss_org_sum.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1          9 -0.63    -0.28  0.02
## fes_p_ss_cohesion_sum.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1     9 -1.37     2.29  0.02
## fes_y_ss_fc.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1               9  1.00     0.59  0.02
fes_py_ss$fes_conflict = rowMeans(fes_py_ss[c(2,8,9,15,16,22)], na.rm=T) # collapse across time for each subscale (and informant for conflict)
fes_py_ss$fes_express = rowMeans(fes_py_ss[c(3,10,17)], na.rm=T) 
fes_py_ss$fes_int_cult = rowMeans(fes_py_ss[c(4,11,18)], na.rm=T)
fes_py_ss$fes_act_rec = rowMeans(fes_py_ss[c(5,12,19)], na.rm=T)
fes_py_ss$fes_org = rowMeans(fes_py_ss[c(6,13,20)], na.rm=T)
fes_py_ss$fes_cohesion = rowMeans(fes_py_ss[c(7,14,21)], na.rm=T)

fes = fes_py_ss %>% select(src_subject_id, fes_conflict, fes_cohesion, fes_express, fes_int_cult, fes_org)
psych::describe(fes)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.5 5934.50 4398.87   1 11868
## fes_conflict       2 11866    2.23    1.28    2.0    2.13    1.24   0     8
## fes_cohesion       3 10884    7.29    1.62    8.0    7.52    1.48   0     9
## fes_express        4 10884    6.02    1.45    6.0    6.11    1.48   0     9
## fes_int_cult       5 10884    6.12    1.95    6.0    6.23    1.48   0     9
## fes_org            6 10883    6.19    2.07    7.0    6.35    1.48   0     9
##                 range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11867  0.00    -1.20 31.45
## fes_conflict        8  0.71     0.32  0.01
## fes_cohesion        9 -1.37     2.29  0.02
## fes_express         9 -0.60     0.14  0.01
## fes_int_cult        9 -0.53    -0.24  0.02
## fes_org             9 -0.63    -0.28  0.02

LEC

# LEC - life events checklist parent and child ; binary 0/1 happened/not ; addtl question on good/bad
# decision: restrict to just past year event to reflect acute/recent stress; maybe in baseline use lifetime? 
lec_p = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/mental-health/mh_p_le.csv") # if var = 1 and var_past_yr_p = 1 then 1, 0 ; add all the vars 
psych::describe(lec_p)

lec_p = lec_p %>% filter(!(eventname=="4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) %>%
  filter(!(eventname=="3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) 
lec_y = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/mental-health/mh_y_le.csv")
psych::describe(lec_y)

## ple_y_ss_affected_bad_mean    0     3     3 -0.45    -0.41  0.00
lec_y = lec_y %>% filter(!(eventname=="4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) %>%
  filter(!(eventname=="3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) 
# best way? sum all the "affected" at baseline; in subsequent timepoints, sum all the "affected" if happened in past year
# the extent of the stressful and good event having an impact on the child 
# count both the good and the bad separately
lec_p_baseline = lec_p %>% filter(eventname=="baseline_year_1_arm_1")
lec_p_followup = lec_p %>% filter(!(eventname=="baseline_year_1_arm_1"))
lec_y_baseline = lec_y %>% filter(eventname=="baseline_year_1_arm_1")
lec_y_followup = lec_y %>% filter(!(eventname=="baseline_year_1_arm_1"))

psych::describe(lec_p_baseline) # empty -- not captured at baseline

## ple_hospitalized_fu_p        132     0    NaN      NA     NA     NaN      NA
## ple_p_ss_total_number        133     0    NaN      NA     NA     NaN      NA
## ple_p_ss_total_number_nm     134  8928   25.0    0.00   25.0    25.0    0.00
## ple_p_ss_total_number_nt     135     0    NaN      NA     NA     NaN      NA
## ple_p_ss_total_good          136 11868    0.0    0.00    0.0     0.0    0.00
## ple_p_ss_total_bad           137 11868    0.0    0.00    0.0     0.0    0.00
## ple_p_ss_affected_good_sum   138 11868    0.0    0.00    0.0     0.0    0.00
## ple_p_ss_affected_good_mean  139     0    NaN      NA     NA     NaN      NA
## ple_p_ss_affected_bad_sum    140 11868    0.0    0.00    0.0     0.0    0.00
## ple_p_ss_affected_bad_mean   141     0    NaN      NA     NA     NaN      NA
## ple_p_ss_affected_mean       142     0    NaN      NA     NA     NaN      NA
## ple_p_ss_affect_sum          143     0    NaN      NA     NA     NaN      NA
##                             min   max range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id                1 11868 11867    0     -1.2 31.45
## eventname                     1     1     0  NaN      NaN  0.00
## ple_p_select_language___1     0     0     0  NaN      NaN  0.00
## ple_died_p                  Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_died_past_yr_p          Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_died_fu_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_died_fu2_p              Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_injured_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_injur_p_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_injured_fu_p            Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_injured_fu2_p           Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_crime_p                 Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_crime_past_yr_p         Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_crime_fu_p              Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_crime_fu2_p             Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_friend_p                Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_friend_past_yr_p        Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_friend_fu_p             Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_friend_fu2_p            Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_friend_injur_p          Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_friend_injur_past_yr_p  Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_friend_injur_fu_p       Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_friend_injur_fu2_p      Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_financial_p             Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA

## ple_financial_fu_p          Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_financial_fu2_p         Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA

## ple_sud_fu_p                Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_sud_fu2_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA

## ple_ill_fu_p                Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_ill_fu2_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_injur_p                 Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_injur_p_past            Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_injur_fu_p              Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_injur_fu2_p             Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_argue_p                 Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_argue_past_yr_p         Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_argue_fu_p              Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_argue_fu2_p             Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_job_p                   Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_job_past_yr_p           Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_job_fu_p                Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_job_fu2_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_away_p                  Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_away_past_yr_p          Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_away_fu_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_away_fu2_p              Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_arrest_p                Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_arrest_past_yr_p        Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_arrest_fu_p             Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_arrest_fu2_p            Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_friend_died_p           Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_friend_died_past_yr_p   Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_friend_died_fu_p        Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_friend_died_fu2_p       Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_mh_p                    Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_mh_past_yr_p            Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_mh_fu_p                 Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_mh_fu2_p                Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_sib_p                   Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_sib_past_yr_p           Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_sib_fu_p                Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_sib_fu2_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_victim_p                Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_victim_past_yr_p        Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_victim_fu_p             Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_victim_fu2_p            Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_separ_p                 Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_separ_past_yr_p         Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_separ_fu_p              Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_separ_fu2_p             Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_law_p                   Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_law_past_yr_p           Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_law_fu_p                Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_law_fu2_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_school_p                Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_school_past_yr_p        Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_school_fu_p             Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_school_fu2_p            Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_move_p                  Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_move_past_yr_p          Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_move_fu_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_move_fu2_p              Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_jail_p                  Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_jail_past_yr_p          Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_jail_fu_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_jail_fu2_p              Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_step_p                  Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_step_past_yr_p          Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_step_fu_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_step_fu2_p              Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_new_job_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_new_job_past_yr_p       Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_new_job_fu_p            Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_new_job_fu2_p           Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_new_sib_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_new_sib_past_yr_p       Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_new_sib_fu_p            Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_new_sib_fu2_p           Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_hospitalized_fu2_p      Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_foster_care_p           Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_foster_care_time_p      Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_foster_care_past_yr_p   Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_foster_care_fu_p        Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_foster_care_fu2_p       Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_hit_p                   Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_hit_past_yr_p           Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_hit_fu_p                Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_hit_fu2_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_shot_p                  Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_shot_past_yr_p          Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_shot_fu_p               Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_shot_fu2_p              Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_lockdown_p              Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_lockdown_past_yr_p      Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_lockdown_fu_p           Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_lockdown_fu2_p          Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_homeless_p              Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_homeless_past_yr_p      Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_deported_p              Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_homeless_fu_p           Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_homeless_fu2_p          Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_deported_past_yr_p      Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_deported_fu_p           Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_deported_fu2_p          Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_hospitalized_p          Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_hospitalized_past_yr_p  Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_hospitalized_fu_p       Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_p_ss_total_number       Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_p_ss_total_number_nm     25    25     0  NaN      NaN  0.00
## ple_p_ss_total_number_nt    Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_p_ss_total_good           0     0     0  NaN      NaN  0.00
## ple_p_ss_total_bad            0     0     0  NaN      NaN  0.00
## ple_p_ss_affected_good_sum    0     0     0  NaN      NaN  0.00
## ple_p_ss_affected_good_mean Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_p_ss_affected_bad_sum     0     0     0  NaN      NaN  0.00
## ple_p_ss_affected_bad_mean  Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_p_ss_affected_mean      Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
## ple_p_ss_affect_sum         Inf  -Inf  -Inf   NA       NA    NA
lec_p_followup %>% count(eventname) # 1yr follow up and 2yr follow up
##                  eventname     n
## 1 1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 11220
## 2 2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 10973
lec_p_1yr = lec_p %>% filter(eventname=="1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")
lec_p_2yr = lec_p %>% filter(eventname=="2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")
lec_y_1yr = lec_y %>% filter(eventname=="1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")
lec_y_2yr = lec_y %>% filter(eventname=="2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")

# narrow down separate datasets
lec_p_1yr = lec_p_1yr %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, ple_p_ss_affected_bad_sum)
lec_y_1yr = lec_y_1yr %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, ple_y_ss_affected_bad_sum)
colnames(lec_p_1yr) = c("src_subject_id", "eventname", "lec_affect_bad_p")
colnames(lec_y_1yr) = c("src_subject_id", "eventname", "lec_affect_bad_y")

# do the 2yr follow up; this time only count the one that happened in the past year 
# logic condition below is: if missing then record as NA, but if not missing and event did not occur, then record as 0; 
# else, if event happened in the past year and it's a bad event, then record the value of how much it affected child;
# else, record value as 0
lec_p_2yr = lec_p_2yr %>%
  mutate(
    lec_affect_bad_p = rowSums(cbind(
      if_else(ple_died_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_died_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_died_fu_p == '2'), ple_died_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_injured_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_injur_p_p == '0' & ple_injured_fu_p == '2'), ple_injured_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_crime_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_crime_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_crime_fu_p == '2'), ple_crime_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_friend_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_friend_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_friend_fu_p == '2'), ple_friend_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_friend_injur_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_friend_injur_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_friend_injur_fu_p == '2'), ple_friend_injur_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_financial_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_financial_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_financial_fu_p == '2'), ple_financial_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_sud_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_sud_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_sud_fu_p == '2'), ple_sud_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_ill_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_ill_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_ill_fu_p == '2'), ple_ill_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_injur_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_injur_p_past == '0' & ple_injur_fu_p == '2'), ple_injur_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_argue_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_argue_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_argue_fu_p == '2'), ple_argue_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_job_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_job_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_job_fu_p == '2'), ple_job_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_away_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_away_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_away_fu_p == '2'), ple_away_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_arrest_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_arrest_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_arrest_fu_p == '2'), ple_arrest_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_friend_died_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_friend_died_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_friend_died_fu_p == '2'), ple_friend_died_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_mh_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_mh_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_mh_fu_p == '2'), ple_mh_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_sib_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_sib_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_sib_fu_p == '2'), ple_sib_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_victim_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_victim_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_victim_fu_p == '2'), ple_victim_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_separ_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_separ_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_separ_fu_p == '2'), ple_separ_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_law_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_law_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_law_fu_p == '2'), ple_law_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_school_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_school_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_school_fu_p == '2'), ple_school_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_move_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_move_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_move_fu_p == '2'), ple_move_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_jail_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_jail_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_jail_fu_p == '2'), ple_jail_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_step_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_step_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_step_fu_p == '2'), ple_step_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_new_job_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_new_job_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_new_job_fu_p == '2'), ple_new_job_fu2_p, 0)),
      if_else(ple_new_sib_p=="0", 0, if_else((ple_new_sib_past_yr_p == '0' & ple_new_sib_fu_p == '2'), ple_new_sib_fu2_p, 0))),
      na.rm = TRUE))
lec_p_2yr = lec_p_2yr %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, lec_affect_bad_p)

lec_y_2yr = lec_y_2yr %>%
  mutate(
    lec_affect_bad_y = rowSums(cbind(
      if_else(ple_died_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_died_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_died_fu_y == '2', ple_died_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_injured_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_injured_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_injured_fu_y == '2', ple_injured_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_crime_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_crime_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_crime_fu_y == '2', ple_crime_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_friend_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_friend_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_friend_fu_y == '2', ple_friend_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_friend_injur_y=="0", 0, if_else(le_friend_injur_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_friend_injur_fu_y == '2', ple_friend_injur_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_financial_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_financial_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_financial_fu_y == '2', ple_financial_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_sud_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_sud_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_sud_fu_y == '2', ple_sud_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_ill_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_ill_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_ill_fu_y == '2', ple_ill_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_injur_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_injur_y_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_injur_fu_y == '2', ple_injur_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_argue_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_argue_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_argue_fu_y == '2', ple_argue_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_job_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_job_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_job_fu_y == '2', ple_job_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_away_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_away_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_away_fu_y == '2', ple_away_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_arrest_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_arrest_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_arrest_fu_y == '2', ple_arrest_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_friend_died_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_friend_died_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_friend_died_fu_y == '2', ple_friend_died_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_mh_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_mh_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_mh_fu_y == '2', ple_mh_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_sib_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_sib_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_sib_fu_y == '2', ple_sib_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_victim_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_victim_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_victim_fu_y == '2', ple_victim_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_separ_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_separ_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_separ_fu_y == '2', ple_separ_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_law_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_law_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_law_fu_y == '2', ple_law_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_school_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_school_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_school_fu_y == '2', ple_school_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_move_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_move_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_move_fu_y == '2', ple_move_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_jail_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_jail_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_jail_fu_y == '2', ple_jail_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_step_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_step_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_step_fu_y == '2', ple_step_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_new_job_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_new_job_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_new_job_fu_y == '2', ple_new_job_fu2_y, 0))),
      if_else(ple_new_sib_y=="0", 0, if_else(ple_new_sib_past_yr_y == '0', 0, if_else(ple_new_sib_fu_y == '2', ple_new_sib_fu2_y, 0)))),
      na.rm = TRUE))
lec_y_2yr = lec_y_2yr %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, lec_affect_bad_y)

# collapse across informant for each year
lec_py_ss_1yr = left_join(lec_p_1yr, lec_y_1yr)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id, eventname)`
lec_py_ss_1yr$lec_bad_py = rowMeans(lec_py_ss_1yr[c(3,4)], na.rm=T) # collapse across informant
lec_py_ss_2yr = left_join(lec_p_2yr, lec_y_2yr)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id, eventname)`
lec_py_ss_2yr$lec_bad_py = rowMeans(lec_py_ss_2yr[c(3,4)], na.rm=T) # collapse across informant

# combine and reshape to collapse across timepoint
lec_py_ss = rbind(lec_py_ss_1yr %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, lec_bad_py),
                  lec_py_ss_2yr %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, lec_bad_py))
lec_py_ss = reshape(lec_py_ss, idvar="src_subject_id", timevar="eventname", direction="wide")
psych::describe(lec_py_ss)
##                                     vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed
## src_subject_id*                        1 11468 5734.50 3310.67 5734.5 5734.50
## lec_bad_py.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    2 11220    3.58    3.66    2.5    2.98
## lec_bad_py.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    3 10973    1.63    2.17    1.0    1.20
##                                         mad min   max range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*                     4250.61   1 11468 11467 0.00    -1.20 30.92
## lec_bad_py.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    2.97   0    30    30 1.89     5.13  0.03
## lec_bad_py.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    1.48   0    24    24 2.59    10.79  0.02
lec_py_ss$lec_bad = rowSums(lec_py_ss[c(2,3)], na.rm=T) # collapse across time
lec = lec_py_ss %>% select(src_subject_id, lec_bad)
psych::describe(lec)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min     max
## src_subject_id*    1 11468 5734.50 3310.67 5734.5 5734.50 4250.61   1 11468.0
## lec_bad            2 11468    5.06    4.99    3.5    4.28    3.71   0    47.5
##                   range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11467.0 0.00    -1.20 30.92
## lec_bad            47.5 1.98     6.09  0.05

ABCL

# ABCL - parent reported mh of the other caregiver
# questions about who the person is; whether or not child lived with the person in the past year; use raw score
# restrict to only father and if the person lived with the person in the past year...
# if you take a mean of that, then you're measuring the extent of mh problems in the other caregiver over time
abcl_p = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/mental-health/mh_p_abcl.csv") 
psych::describe(abcl_p)
##                             vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad
## src_subject_id                 1 15735 5511.57 3185.77   5497 5509.36 4084.56

## abcl_about_age_p               7 13191   44.79    7.20     45   44.62    7.41

## abcl_scr_prob_total_nm        0     4.0     4.0  1.84     1.38  0.01

## abcl_scr_prob_critical_r      0    31.0    31.0  3.00    13.71  0.02
## abcl_scr_prob_critical_t     50    92.0    42.0  2.02     4.58  0.05
## abcl_scr_prob_critical_nm     0    19.0    19.0  1.84     1.37  0.06
## abcl_scr_prob_critical_nt    19    19.0     0.0   NaN      NaN  0.00
abcl_p %>% count(eventname)
##                  eventname     n
## 1 2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 10973
## 2 3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1     8
## 3 4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1  4754
abcl_p = abcl_p %>% filter(eventname=="2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1") # year 3 is empty
abcl_p %>% count(abcl_about_rel_p) # most about the father, but also some about the mother 1=mom; 2=dad
##    abcl_about_rel_p    n
## 1                 1 1105
## 2                 2 6800
## 3                 3   60
## 4                 4  346
## 5                 5   30
## 6                 6  211
## 7                 7   12
## 8                 8   20
## 9                 9    6
## 10               10   34
## 11               11   15
## 12               12   62
## 13               13   42
## 14               14  463
## 15               NA 1767
abcl = abcl_p %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, abcl_scr_prob_total_r)
abcl = reshape(abcl, idvar="src_subject_id", timevar="eventname", direction="wide")
colnames(abcl) = c("src_subject_id", "abcl")
psych::describe(abcl)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 10973 5487.00 3167.78   5487 5487.00 4066.77   1 10973
## abcl               2  9204   23.88   22.77     17   20.05   16.31   0   195
##                 range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 10972 0.00    -1.20 30.24
## abcl              195 1.85     4.44  0.24

ASR

# ASR - parent adult self report of mh
asr_p = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/mental-health/mh_p_asr.csv") 
psych::describe(asr_p)
##                           vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min
## src_subject_id               1 27603 5928.90 3430.01   5921 5928.35 4400.36   1

## asr_scr_external_nm          35    35 13.23   173.06  0.02
## asr_scr_totprob_r           154   154  1.62     3.52  0.11
## asr_scr_totprob_t            90    65  0.30    -0.12  0.06
## asr_scr_totprob_total        99     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## asr_scr_totprob_nm           99    99 13.23   173.06  0.04
## asr_scr_depress_r            28    28  1.41     2.34  0.02
## asr_scr_depress_t           100    50  1.87     3.79  0.04
## asr_scr_depress_total        14     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## asr_scr_depress_nm           14    14 13.15   170.81  0.01
## asr_scr_anxdisord_r          12    12  0.64     0.02  0.02
## asr_scr_anxdisord_t          80    30  2.23     5.24  0.03
## asr_scr_anxdisord_total       6     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## asr_scr_anxdisord_nm          6     6 13.15   170.81  0.00
## asr_scr_somaticpr_r          18    18  1.83     4.34  0.01
## asr_scr_somaticpr_t         100    50  1.86     4.50  0.04
## asr_scr_somaticpr_total       9     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## asr_scr_somaticpr_nm          9     9 13.15   170.81  0.00
## asr_scr_avoidant_r           14    14  1.34     1.88  0.01
## asr_scr_avoidant_t           90    40  2.18     5.04  0.03
## asr_scr_avoidant_total        7     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## asr_scr_avoidant_nm           7     7 13.15   170.81  0.00
## asr_scr_adhd_r               25    25  1.37     2.08  0.02
## asr_scr_adhd_t               98    48  2.40     6.76  0.03
## asr_scr_adhd_total           13     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## asr_scr_adhd_nm              13    13 13.15   170.81  0.01
## asr_scr_antisocial_r         30    30  2.28     8.76  0.01
## asr_scr_antisocial_t         90    40  2.26     5.49  0.03
## asr_scr_antisocial_total     20     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## asr_scr_antisocial_nm        20    20 13.15   170.81  0.01
## asr_scr_inattention_r        14    14  1.24     1.50  0.01
## asr_scr_inattention_t        90    40  1.91     3.73  0.04
## asr_scr_inattention_total     7     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## asr_scr_inattention_nm        7     7 13.15   170.81  0.00
## asr_scr_hyperactive_r        12    12  1.65     3.17  0.01
## asr_scr_hyperactive_t        80    30  2.80     8.18  0.03
## asr_scr_hyperactive_total     6     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## asr_scr_hyperactive_nm        6     6 13.15   170.81  0.00
asr_p_ss = asr_p %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, asr_scr_totprob_r)
asr_p_ss = asr_p_ss %>% filter(eventname=="2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1" | eventname=="baseline_year_1_arm_1")
asr_p_ss = reshape(asr_p_ss, idvar="src_subject_id", timevar="eventname", direction="wide")
psych::describe(asr_p_ss)
##                                            vars     n    mean      sd median
## src_subject_id*                               1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.5
## asr_scr_totprob_r.baseline_year_1_arm_1       2 11864   21.14   17.96   16.0
## asr_scr_totprob_r.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    3 10899   20.57   17.52   16.0
##                                            trimmed     mad min   max range skew
## src_subject_id*                            5934.50 4398.87   1 11868 11867 0.00
## asr_scr_totprob_r.baseline_year_1_arm_1      18.46   13.34   0   154   154 1.64
## asr_scr_totprob_r.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1   17.98   13.34   0   133   133 1.64
##                                            kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*                               -1.20 31.45
## asr_scr_totprob_r.baseline_year_1_arm_1        3.58  0.16
## asr_scr_totprob_r.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1     3.67  0.17
asr_p_ss$asr = rowMeans(asr_p_ss[2:3], na.rm=T)

asr = asr_p_ss %>% select(src_subject_id, asr)
psych::describe(asr)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.5 5934.50 4398.87   1 11868
## asr                2 11866   20.94   16.68   16.5   18.57   13.34   0   154
##                 range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11867 0.00    -1.20 31.45
## asr               154 1.56     3.34  0.15

PBP

# PBP - youth-reported peer behavior profile 
pbp_y = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/culture-environment/ce_y_pbp.csv") 
psych::describe(pbp_y)
##                           vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min
## src_subject_id*              1 26063 5590.19 3232.10   5578 5589.19 4149.80   1
## eventname*                   2 26063    1.76    0.74      2    1.70    1.48   1
## pbp_athletes                 3 26003   31.96  166.89      3    3.27    1.48   1
## pbp_skip_school              4 26003   75.79  262.14      1    1.31    0.00   1
## pbp_church                   5 26003  155.41  358.95      3   69.27    1.48   1
## pbp_suspended                6 26003   66.48  246.48      1    1.26    0.00   1
## pbp_good_student             7 26003   80.83  266.26      4    3.82    1.48   1
## pbp_shoplifted               8 26003  111.57  313.14      1   14.48    0.00   1
## pbp_admin                    9 13454    1.58    0.67      1    1.47    0.00   1
## pbp_ss_prosocial_peers      10 24774    9.00    2.79      9    9.01    2.97   2
## pbp_ss_prosocial_peers_nm   11 26063    0.27    0.58      0    0.13    0.00   0
## pbp_ss_prosocial_peers_nt   12 26063    3.00    0.00      3    3.00    0.00   3
## pbp_ss_rule_break           13 24316    3.64    1.38      3    3.38    0.00   2
## pbp_ss_rule_break_nm        14 26063    0.26    0.65      0    0.08    0.00   0
## pbp_ss_rule_break_nt        15 26063    3.00    0.00      3    3.00    0.00   3
##                             max range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*           11189 11188  0.00    -1.20 20.02
## eventname*                    3     2  0.41    -1.08  0.00
## pbp_athletes                999   998  5.62    29.60  1.03
## pbp_skip_school             999   998  3.24     8.48  1.63
## pbp_church                  999   998  1.92     1.70  2.23
## pbp_suspended               999   998  3.52    10.38  1.53
## pbp_good_student            999   998  3.16     7.97  1.65
## pbp_shoplifted              999   998  2.48     4.16  1.94
## pbp_admin                     3     2  0.74    -0.56  0.01
## pbp_ss_prosocial_peers       15    13 -0.05    -0.57  0.02
## pbp_ss_prosocial_peers_nm     3     3  2.37     5.63  0.00
## pbp_ss_prosocial_peers_nt     3     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## pbp_ss_rule_break            15    13  2.72    10.65  0.01
## pbp_ss_rule_break_nm          3     3  2.74     7.06  0.00
## pbp_ss_rule_break_nt          3     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
pbp_y[pbp_y==999] = NA
pbp_y[pbp_y==998] = NA
pbp = pbp_y %>% 
  filter(eventname=="2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1") 
pbp = reshape(pbp, idvar="src_subject_id", timevar="eventname", direction="wide")
pbp = pbp %>% mutate(peers_prosocial = rowMeans(select(., pbp_athletes.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1, 
                                                       pbp_church.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1, pbp_good_student.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1), na.rm=T), 
                     peers_rulebreak = rowMeans(select(., pbp_skip_school.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1, 
                                                       pbp_suspended.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1, pbp_shoplifted.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1), na.rm=T)) %>% 
  select(src_subject_id, peers_prosocial, peers_rulebreak) # mean ; min 1 item
psych::describe(pbp)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 10973 5487.00 3167.78 5487.00 5487.00 4066.77   1 10973
## peers_prosocial    2 10871    3.18    0.90    3.33    3.18    0.99   1     5
## peers_rulebreak    3 10773    1.25    0.48    1.00    1.13    0.00   1     5
##                 range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 10972  0.00    -1.20 30.24
## peers_prosocial     4 -0.09    -0.53  0.01
## peers_rulebreak     4  3.09    12.74  0.00

PNH

# PNH - peer network health 
pnh_y = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/culture-environment/ce_y_pnh.csv")
psych::describe(pnh_y)
##                            vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad
## src_subject_id*               1 26063 5590.19 3232.10   5578 5589.19 4149.80
## eventname*                    2 26063    1.76    0.74      2    1.70    1.48
## pnh_substance                 3 26001    1.31    1.49      0    1.26    0.00
## pnh_help                      4 26002    1.33    0.94      2    1.41    0.00
## pnh_how_much_help             5 17311    6.76    2.20      7    6.88    1.48
## pnh_encourage                 6 26003    1.13    0.99      2    1.16    0.00
## pnh_how_much_encourage        7 14686    6.74    2.20      7    6.83    2.97
## pnh_art_involve               8 14686    0.41    0.49      0    0.38    0.00
## pnh_admin                     9 13281    1.57    0.67      1    1.46    0.00
## pnh_ss_protective_scale      10 26000   12.07    8.08     12   11.99   10.38
## pnh_ss_protective_scale_nm   11 26063    0.78    0.80      1    0.72    1.48
## pnh_ss_protective_scale_nt   12 26063    5.00    0.00      5    5.00    0.00
##                            min   max range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*              1 11189 11188  0.00    -1.20 20.02
## eventname*                   1     3     2  0.41    -1.08  0.00
## pnh_substance                0     3     3  0.26    -1.93  0.01
## pnh_help                     0     2     2 -0.70    -1.51  0.01
## pnh_how_much_help            1    10     9 -0.45    -0.25  0.02
## pnh_encourage                0     2     2 -0.26    -1.93  0.01
## pnh_how_much_encourage       1    10     9 -0.29    -0.49  0.02
## pnh_art_involve              0     1     1  0.38    -1.85  0.00
## pnh_admin                    1     3     2  0.78    -0.54  0.01
## pnh_ss_protective_scale      0    27    27  0.00    -1.13  0.05
## pnh_ss_protective_scale_nm   0     5     5  0.69     0.38  0.00
## pnh_ss_protective_scale_nt   5     5     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
pnh_y_ss = pnh_y %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, pnh_ss_protective_scale) # sum ; items #1, #2, #3 must be answered
pnh_y_ss %>% count(eventname)
##                  eventname     n
## 1 2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 10973
## 2 3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 10336
## 3 4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1  4754
pnh_y_ss = pnh_y_ss %>% filter(eventname=="2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")
pnh = pnh_y_ss %>% select(src_subject_id, pnh = pnh_ss_protective_scale)
psych::describe(pnh)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 10973 5487.00 3167.78   5487 5487.00 4066.77   1 10973
## pnh                2 10935   11.68    8.16     11   11.49   10.38   0    27
##                 range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 10972 0.00    -1.20 30.24
## pnh                27 0.08    -1.14  0.08

SRPF

# SRPF - school risk and protective factors
srpf_y = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/culture-environment/ce_y_srpf.csv")
psych::describe(srpf_y) 
##                   vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*      1 49151 5931.30 3430.60   5928 5931.60 4406.29   1 11868
## eventname*           2 49151    2.90    1.48      3    2.87    1.48   1     5
## school_2_y           3 49054    2.91    0.86      3    2.97    1.48   1     4
## school_3_y           4 49053    3.51    0.64      4    3.60    0.00   1     4
## school_4_y           5 49053    3.33    0.72      3    3.43    1.48   1     4
## school_5_y           6 49053    3.40    0.81      4    3.54    0.00   1     4
## school_6_y           7 49053    3.57    0.64      4    3.68    0.00   1     4
## school_7_y           8 49052    3.06    0.88      3    3.14    1.48   1     4
## school_8_y           9 49053    3.10    0.82      3    3.19    1.48   1     4
## school_9_y          10 49053    3.28    0.79      3    3.39    1.48   1     4
## school_10_y         11 49053    3.45    0.68      4    3.55    0.00   1     4
## school_12_y         12 49054    2.96    0.94      3    3.07    1.48   1     4
## school_15_y         13 49054    2.42    0.99      2    2.40    1.48   1     4
## school_17_y         14 49052    1.58    0.85      1    1.41    0.00   1     4
## school_admin        15 13454    1.58    0.67      1    1.47    0.00   1     3
## school_device       16 14882    2.40    0.83      3    2.51    0.00   1     3
## srpf_y_ss_ses       17 49053   19.78    2.80     20   19.97    2.97   6    24
## srpf_y_ss_ses_nm    18 49151    0.01    0.27      0    0.00    0.00   0     6
## srpf_y_ss_ses_nt    19 49151    6.00    0.00      6    6.00    0.00   6     6
## srpf_y_ss_iiss      20 49053   12.80    2.35     13   12.97    2.97   4    16
## srpf_y_ss_iiss_nm   21 49151    0.01    0.18      0    0.00    0.00   0     4
## srpf_y_ss_iiss_nt   22 49151    4.00    0.00      4    4.00    0.00   4     4
## srpf_y_ss_dfs       23 49052    4.00    1.40      4    3.91    1.48   2     8
## srpf_y_ss_dfs_nm    24 49151    0.00    0.09      0    0.00    0.00   0     2
## srpf_y_ss_dfs_nt    25 49151    2.00    0.00      2    2.00    0.00   2     2
##                   range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*   11867  0.00    -1.20 15.47
## eventname*            4  0.20    -1.34  0.01
## school_2_y            3 -0.50    -0.33  0.00
## school_3_y            3 -1.27     1.84  0.00
## school_4_y            3 -0.86     0.40  0.00
## school_5_y            3 -1.27     0.94  0.00
## school_6_y            3 -1.56     2.54  0.00
## school_7_y            3 -0.57    -0.54  0.00
## school_8_y            3 -0.71     0.02  0.00
## school_9_y            3 -0.94     0.39  0.00
## school_10_y           3 -1.14     1.19  0.00
## school_12_y           3 -0.60    -0.52  0.00
## school_15_y           3  0.10    -1.02  0.00
## school_17_y           3  1.38     0.97  0.00
## school_admin          2  0.74    -0.57  0.01
## school_device         2 -0.87    -0.98  0.01
## srpf_y_ss_ses        18 -0.71     0.62  0.01
## srpf_y_ss_ses_nm      6 22.34   497.54  0.00
## srpf_y_ss_ses_nt      0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## srpf_y_ss_iiss       12 -0.65     0.18  0.01
## srpf_y_ss_iiss_nm     4 22.37   498.79  0.00
## srpf_y_ss_iiss_nt     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## srpf_y_ss_dfs         6  0.49    -0.14  0.01
## srpf_y_ss_dfs_nm      2 22.33   497.16  0.00
## srpf_y_ss_dfs_nt      0   NaN      NaN  0.00
# high correlation between srpf across subscales; make sense to just sum; need to recode disengagement (qs 15, 17)
srpf_y_ss = srpf_y %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, srpf_y_ss_ses, srpf_y_ss_iiss, school_15_y, school_17_y) %>% 
  filter(eventname=="baseline_year_1_arm_1" | eventname=="1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1" | 
           eventname=="2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")
srpf_y_ss$school_15_y = 5 - srpf_y_ss$school_15_y
srpf_y_ss$school_17_y = 5 - srpf_y_ss$school_17_y
# srpf_y_ss$disengage = srpf_y_ss$school_15_y + srpf_y_ss$school_17_y
srpf_y_ss$srpf = rowMeans(srpf_y_ss[3:6], na.rm=T) # collapse across subscales
srpf = reshape(srpf_y_ss %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, srpf), idvar="src_subject_id", timevar="eventname", direction="wide")
psych::describe(srpf)
##                               vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed
## src_subject_id*                  1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.50 5934.50
## srpf.baseline_year_1_arm_1       2 11844    9.81    1.36   10.00    9.92
## srpf.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    3 11213    9.97    1.31   10.25   10.08
## srpf.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    4 10934    9.57    1.35    9.75    9.64
##                                   mad  min   max    range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*               4398.87 1.00 11868 11867.00  0.00    -1.20 31.45
## srpf.baseline_year_1_arm_1       1.48 1.00    12    11.00 -0.83     0.94  0.01
## srpf.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    1.11 3.25    12     8.75 -0.83     0.77  0.01
## srpf.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    1.48 3.25    12     8.75 -0.54     0.28  0.01
srpf$srpf = rowMeans(srpf[2:4], na.rm=T) # collapse across timepoints

srpf = srpf %>% select(src_subject_id, srpf)
psych::describe(srpf)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed     mad  min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.50 5934.50 4398.87 1.00 11868
## srpf               2 11861    9.79    1.10    9.92    9.85    1.11 4.25    12
##                    range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11867.00  0.00    -1.20 31.45
## srpf                7.75 -0.66     0.55  0.01

PEQ

# PEQ - peer experience questionnaire
peq_y = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/mental-health/mh_y_peq.csv")
psych::describe(peq_y)

## peq_ss_relational_victim_nm   0     3     3 19.08   362.06  0.00
## peq_ss_relational_victim_nt   3     3     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## peq_ss_reputation_aggs        3    15    12  6.73    67.25  0.00
## peq_ss_reputation_aggs_nm     0     3     3 19.08   362.06  0.00
## peq_ss_reputation_aggs_nt     3     3     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## peq_ss_reputation_victim      3    15    12  2.69     8.98  0.01
## peq_ss_reputation_victim_nm   0     3     3 19.08   362.06  0.00
## peq_ss_reputation_victim_nt   3     3     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## peq_ss_overt_aggression       3    15    12  4.79    30.98  0.01
## peq_ss_overt_aggression_nm    0     3     3 19.08   362.06  0.00
## peq_ss_overt_aggression_nt    3     3     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## peq_ss_overt_victim           3    15    12  3.18    13.39  0.01
## peq_ss_overt_victim_nm        0     3     3 19.08   362.06  0.00
## peq_ss_overt_victim_nt        3     3     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## peq_ss_relational_aggs        3    15    12  1.90     4.92  0.01
peq_y %>% count(eventname) 
##                  eventname     n
## 1 2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 10973
## 2 3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 10336
## 3 4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1  4754
peq_y_ss = peq_y %>% filter(eventname=="2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1") %>% 
  select(src_subject_id, eventname, peq_ss_relational_victim, peq_ss_reputation_victim, peq_ss_overt_victim)
psych::describe(peq_y_ss)
##                          vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min
## src_subject_id*             1 10973 5487.00 3167.78   5487 5487.00 4066.77   1
## eventname*                  2 10973    1.00    0.00      1    1.00    0.00   1
## peq_ss_relational_victim    3 10946    4.73    1.92      4    4.43    1.48   3
## peq_ss_reputation_victim    4 10946    3.97    1.80      3    3.54    0.00   3
## peq_ss_overt_victim         5 10946    3.67    1.37      3    3.33    0.00   3
##                            max range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*          10973 10972 0.00    -1.20 30.24
## eventname*                   1     0  NaN      NaN  0.00
## peq_ss_relational_victim    15    12 1.48     3.00  0.02
## peq_ss_reputation_victim    15    12 2.64     8.65  0.02
## peq_ss_overt_victim         15    12 3.04    12.29  0.01
peq_y_ss$peq = rowMeans(peq_y_ss[3:5], na.rm=T) # collapse across subscales

peq = peq_y_ss %>% select(src_subject_id, peq)
# sum ; all items must be answered; relational victim/aggressor, reputation victim/aggressor, overt victim/aggressor
# only cares when it's a victim; aggressor is suggesting delinquency 
psych::describe(peq)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 10973 5487.00 3167.78 5487.00 5487.00 4066.77   1 10973
## peq                2 10946    4.12    1.40    3.67    3.86    0.99   3    15
##                 range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 10972 0.00     -1.2 30.24
## peq                12 2.23      7.3  0.01

MACV

## macv_p_ss_fs                 1     5     4 -0.81     1.52  0.00

## macv_p_ss_fs_nt              6     6     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## macv_p_ss_fo                 1     5     4 -0.17     0.30  0.00
## macv_p_ss_fo_nm              0     5     5  1.26    -0.42  0.01
## macv_p_ss_fo_nt              5     5     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## macv_p_ss_isr                1     5     4 -0.15     0.65  0.00
## macv_p_ss_isr_nm             0     5     5  1.90     1.60  0.01
## macv_p_ss_isr_nt             5     5     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## macv_p_ss_fr                 1     5     4 -0.21    -0.10  0.00
## macv_p_ss_fr_nm              0     5     5  1.26    -0.31  0.01
## macv_p_ss_fr_nt              5     5     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## macv_p_ss_r                  1     5     4 -0.30    -1.35  0.01
## macv_p_ss_r_nm               0     7     7  1.90     1.60  0.01
## macv_p_ss_r_nt               7     7     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
macv_y = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/culture-environment/ce_y_macv.csv")
psych::describe(macv_y)

## macv_q26          28 15657    4.23    0.80    4.00    4.33    1.48   1     5

## macv_y_ss_fr_nm   33 26063    2.00    2.45    0.00    1.87    0.00   0     5
## macv_y_ss_fr_nt   34 26063    5.00    0.00    5.00    5.00    0.00   5     5
## macv_y_ss_fs      35 15654    4.06    0.66    4.00    4.10    0.74   1     5
## macv_y_ss_fs_nm   36 26063    2.40    2.94    0.00    2.24    0.00   0     6
## macv_y_ss_fs_nt   37 26063    6.00    0.00    6.00    6.00    0.00   6     6
## macv_y_ss_fo      38 15656    3.79    0.69    3.80    3.81    0.59   1     5
## macv_y_ss_fo_nm   39 26063    2.00    2.45    0.00    1.87    0.00   0     5
## macv_y_ss_fo_nt   40 26063    5.00    0.00    5.00    5.00    0.00   5     5
## macv_y_ss_fr      41 15654    3.64    0.79    3.60    3.66    0.89   1     5
## macv_y_ss_isr     42 10315    3.23    0.65    3.20    3.22    0.59   1     5
## macv_y_ss_r       43 10305    2.86    1.15    2.86    2.85    1.48   1     5
##                 range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11188  0.00    -1.20 20.02
## eventname*          2  0.41    -1.08  0.00
## macv_q1             4 -0.04    -1.06  0.01
## macv_q2             4 -0.48    -0.23  0.01
## macv_q3             4 -0.28    -0.55  0.01
## macv_q4             4 -0.23    -0.57  0.01
## macv_q5             4 -0.35    -0.34  0.01
## macv_q6             4  0.83    -0.56  0.01
## macv_q7             4 -0.96     0.82  0.01
## macv_q8             4 -0.52    -0.13  0.01
## macv_q9             4 -0.23    -0.39  0.01
## macv_q10            4 -0.05    -0.56  0.01
## macv_q11            4  0.17    -1.06  0.01
## macv_q12            4 -1.05     0.99  0.01
## macv_q13            4 -0.31    -0.44  0.01
## macv_q14            4 -0.58     0.14  0.01
## macv_q15            4 -0.16    -1.03  0.01
## macv_q16            4 -0.69     0.10  0.01
## macv_q17            4 -0.85     0.42  0.01
## macv_q18            4 -0.46    -0.36  0.01
## macv_q19            4  0.48    -0.52  0.01
## macv_q20            4 -0.02    -1.25  0.01
## macv_q21            4 -0.86     0.58  0.01
## macv_q22            4 -0.38    -0.33  0.01
## macv_q23            4 -0.56    -0.16  0.01
## macv_q24            4 -0.24    -0.35  0.01
## macv_q25            4 -0.01    -1.23  0.01
## macv_q26            4 -0.93     0.76  0.01
## macv_q27            4 -0.51    -0.22  0.01
## macv_q28            4  0.00    -1.04  0.01
## macv_comprehend     1 -4.47    18.00  0.00
## macv_admin          2  0.68    -0.83  0.01
## macv_y_ss_fr_nm     5  0.41    -1.83  0.02
## macv_y_ss_fr_nt     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## macv_y_ss_fs        4 -0.71     0.64  0.01
## macv_y_ss_fs_nm     6  0.41    -1.83  0.02
## macv_y_ss_fs_nt     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## macv_y_ss_fo        4 -0.26    -0.13  0.01
## macv_y_ss_fo_nm     5  0.41    -1.83  0.02
## macv_y_ss_fo_nt     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## macv_y_ss_fr        4 -0.27    -0.23  0.01
## macv_y_ss_isr       4  0.05    -0.10  0.01
## macv_y_ss_r         4  0.06    -1.07  0.01
# 5 subscales: fam support, fam obligation, independence/self-reliance, family as referent, religion
# based on Campos et al. 2019, measurement properties from fam support, fam obligation, family as referent hangs together
# mean ; all items must be answered
macv_py_ss = full_join(macv_p %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, macv_p_ss_fs, macv_p_ss_fo, macv_p_ss_fr), 
                       macv_y %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, macv_y_ss_fs, macv_y_ss_fo, macv_y_ss_fr))
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id, eventname)`
macv_py_ss %>% count(eventname)
##                  eventname     n
## 1 1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 11220
## 2 2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 10973
## 3 3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 10336
## 4 4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1  4754
## 5    baseline_year_1_arm_1 11868
macv_py_ss = macv_py_ss %>% filter(!(eventname=="4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) %>% filter(!(eventname=="3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) 
macv_py_ss$familism = rowMeans(macv_py_ss[3:8], na.rm=T) # collapse across scales and informant
macv_py_ss = reshape(macv_py_ss %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, familism), idvar="src_subject_id", timevar="eventname", direction="wide") 
psych::describe(macv_py_ss)
##                                   vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed
## src_subject_id*                      1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.50 5934.50
## familism.baseline_year_1_arm_1       2 11862    3.72    0.60    3.72    3.73
## familism.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    3 11202    3.61    0.64    3.62    3.62
## familism.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    4 10963    3.79    0.49    3.81    3.80
##                                       mad min   max range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*                   4398.87   1 11868 11867  0.00    -1.20 31.45
## familism.baseline_year_1_arm_1       0.59   1     5     4 -0.22     0.13  0.01
## familism.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    0.59   1     5     4 -0.49     1.21  0.01
## familism.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    0.49   1     5     4 -0.26     0.13  0.00
macv_py_ss$familism = rowMeans(macv_py_ss[2:4], na.rm=T) # collapse across time

macv = macv_py_ss %>% select(src_subject_id, familism)
psych::describe(macv)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.50 5934.50 4398.87   1 11868
## familism           2 11866    3.71    0.51    3.72    3.72    0.50   1     5
##                 range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11867  0.00     -1.2 31.45
## familism            4 -0.21      0.2  0.00

COMC

# COMC - community cohesion
comc_p = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/culture-environment/ce_p_comc.csv")
psych::describe(comc_p)
##                               vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad
## src_subject_id*                  1 15641 5508.94 3184.02 5494.0 5506.93 4084.56
## eventname*                       2 15641    1.30    0.46    1.0    1.25    0.00
## comc_phenx_select_language       3 15641    0.05    0.22    0.0    0.00    0.00
## comc_phenx_close_knit_p          4 15534   58.16  225.72    4.0    3.61    1.48
## comc_phenx_help_p                5 15534   55.30  219.31    4.0    4.15    1.48
## comc_phenx_get_along_p           6 15534   73.41  252.71    4.0    4.21    1.48
## comc_phenx_share_values_p        7 15534  144.43  346.37    4.0   55.46    1.48
## comc_phenx_trusted_p             8 15534   79.13  262.65    4.0    3.98    1.48
## comc_phenx_skip_p                9 15534  130.06  330.43    4.0   37.55    1.48
## comc_phenx_graffiti_p           10 15534   82.05  265.98    5.0    4.69    0.00
## comc_phenx_disrespect_p         11 15534  151.40  353.20    4.0   64.20    1.48
## comc_phenx_fight_p              12 15534  112.07  308.53    5.0   14.96    1.48
## comc_phenx_budget_p             13 15534  145.22  346.56    5.0   56.44    1.48
## comc_ss_cohesion_p              14 15523    4.43   21.50    3.8    3.73    0.89
## comc_ss_cohesion_p_nm           15 15641    0.04    0.44    0.0    0.00    0.00
## comc_ss_control_p               16 15518    4.63   21.50    4.0    4.01    0.89
## comc_ss_control_p_nm            17 15641    0.04    0.45    0.0    0.00    0.00
## comc_ss_control_p_nt            18 15641    5.00    0.00    5.0    5.00    0.00
## comc_ss_collective_capacity_p   19 15525    4.53   20.69    3.9    3.87    0.74
## comc_ss_coll_capacity_p_nm      20 15641    0.08    0.88    0.0    0.00    0.00
## comc_ss_coll_capacity_p_nt      21 15641   10.00    0.00   10.0   10.00    0.00
##                               min   max range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*                 1 11030 11029  0.01    -1.20 25.46
## eventname*                      1     2     1  0.88    -1.22  0.00
## comc_phenx_select_language      0     1     1  3.99    13.90  0.00
## comc_phenx_close_knit_p         1   999   998  3.89    13.19  1.81
## comc_phenx_help_p               1   999   998  4.05    14.41  1.76
## comc_phenx_get_along_p          1   999   998  3.37     9.38  2.03
## comc_phenx_share_values_p       1   999   998  2.05     2.23  2.78
## comc_phenx_trusted_p            1   999   998  3.20     8.27  2.11
## comc_phenx_skip_p               1   999   998  2.24     3.02  2.65
## comc_phenx_graffiti_p           1   999   998  3.14     7.87  2.13
## comc_phenx_disrespect_p         1   999   998  1.98     1.91  2.83
## comc_phenx_fight_p              1   999   998  2.51     4.33  2.48
## comc_phenx_budget_p             1   999   998  2.05     2.21  2.78
## comc_ss_cohesion_p              1   777   776 33.57  1166.30  0.17
## comc_ss_cohesion_p_nm           0     5     5 11.06   121.42  0.00
## comc_ss_control_p               1   777   776 34.32  1206.66  0.17
## comc_ss_control_p_nm            0     5     5 10.76   114.99  0.00
## comc_ss_control_p_nt            5     5     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## comc_ss_collective_capacity_p   1   777   776 34.55  1242.03  0.17
## comc_ss_coll_capacity_p_nm      0    10    10 11.00   120.39  0.01
## comc_ss_coll_capacity_p_nt     10    10     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
# 3 subscales: cohesion, control, collective capacity 
# mean ; minimum 1 item must be answered
comc_p_ss = comc_p %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, comc_ss_cohesion_p, comc_ss_control_p, comc_ss_collective_capacity_p)
comc_p_ss = comc_p_ss %>% filter(eventname=="2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")
psych::describe(comc_p_ss)
##                               vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad
## src_subject_id*                  1 10973 5487.00 3167.78 5487.0 5487.00 4066.77
## eventname*                       2 10973    1.00    0.00    1.0    1.00    0.00
## comc_ss_cohesion_p               3 10855    3.71    0.70    3.8    3.71    0.89
## comc_ss_control_p                4 10850    3.94    0.80    4.0    4.01    0.89
## comc_ss_collective_capacity_p    5 10857    3.82    0.67    3.9    3.86    0.74
##                               min   max range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*                 1 10973 10972  0.00    -1.20 30.24
## eventname*                      1     1     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## comc_ss_cohesion_p              1     5     4 -0.21    -0.07  0.01
## comc_ss_control_p               1     5     4 -0.83     0.63  0.01
## comc_ss_collective_capacity_p   1     5     4 -0.57     0.27  0.01
comc_p_ss$comc = rowMeans(comc_p_ss[3:5], na.rm=T) # collapse across subscales

comc = comc_p_ss %>% select(src_subject_id, comc)
psych::describe(comc)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 10973 5487.00 3167.78 5487.0 5487.00 4066.77   1 10973
## comc               2 10857    3.82    0.67    3.9    3.86    0.74   1     5
##                 range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 10972  0.00    -1.20 30.24
## comc                4 -0.57     0.28  0.01

NBH safety

# neighborhood safety / police contact
nsc_p = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/culture-environment/ce_p_nsc.csv")
psych::describe(nsc_p) # mean ; 3 items ; no minimum ; neighborhood safety
##                           vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min
## src_subject_id*              1 38815 5932.59 3430.22   5931 5932.84 4403.32   1
## eventname*                   2 38815    2.44    1.20      2    2.43    1.48   1

## neighborhood1r_p             4 38585    4.12    0.97      4    4.27    1.48   1
## neighborhood2r_p             5 38550    3.95    1.08      4    4.12    1.48   1

## src_subject_id*           11868 11867  0.00    -1.20 17.41
## eventname*                    4     3  0.16    -1.51  0.01

nsc_y = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/culture-environment/ce_y_nsc.csv")
psych::describe(nsc_y) # the youth measure contains questions about police contact instead; do not include
##                              vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad
## src_subject_id*                 1 38739 5929.39 3428.18   5927 5929.48 4401.84
