## neighborhood_po_phy_y           7   266    0.12    0.33      0    0.03    0.00
## neighb_po_phy_times_y           8    33    1.30    1.07      1    1.19    1.48
## neighb_po_used_slur_y           9   266    0.22    0.42      0    0.15    0.00
## neighb_po_slur_times_y         10    59    1.14    0.94      1    1.04    1.48
## neighb_po_stopped_y            11   266    0.41    0.49      0    0.38    0.00
## neighb_po_stopped_times_y      12   108    1.34    0.95      1    1.27    1.48
## neighb_po_arrested_y           13  2646    0.01    0.10      0    0.00    0.00
## neighb_po_service_y            14  4745  412.87  491.76      1  391.25    1.48
## neighb_po_service_times_y      15  1049    1.15    0.98      1    1.04    1.48
## neighb_po_fam_friend_exp_y     16  4745  371.30  482.69      0  339.30    0.00
## neighb_po_fam_friend_phy_y     17   601    0.24    0.43      0    0.17    0.00
## neighb_po_fam_friend_times_y   18   142    1.09    1.05      1    0.93    1.48
## neighb_po_exp_slur_y           19   601    0.25    0.44      0    0.19    0.00
## neighb_po_exp_slur_times_y     20   152    1.24    1.07      1    1.10    1.48
## neighb_po_stopped_2_y          21   601    0.43    0.49      0    0.41    0.00
## neighb_po_stopped_times_2_y    22   256    1.14    0.99      1    1.01    0.00
## neighb_po_community_y          23  4744    2.98    1.08      3    3.14    1.48
## neighb_po_fair_y               24  4744    3.23    0.83      3    3.32    1.48
## neighb_po_respect_y            25  4744    3.30    0.79      3    3.40    1.48
## neighb_admin                   26  3398    1.94    0.55      2    1.92    0.00
##                              min   max range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*                1 11862 11861  0.00    -1.20 17.42
## eventname*                     1     4     3  0.16    -1.51  0.01
## neighborhood_crime_y           1     5     4 -1.06     0.60  0.01
## neighborhood_po_y              0     1     1  1.70     0.90  0.01
## neighborhood_po_times_y        0     4     4  1.22     1.76  0.03
## neighborhood_po_exp_y          0     1     1  3.86    12.87  0.00
## neighborhood_po_phy_y          0     1     1  2.27     3.16  0.02
## neighb_po_phy_times_y          0     4     4  0.72     0.17  0.19
## neighb_po_used_slur_y          0     1     1  1.33    -0.23  0.03
## neighb_po_slur_times_y         0     4     4  0.97     1.15  0.12
## neighb_po_stopped_y            0     1     1  0.38    -1.86  0.03
## neighb_po_stopped_times_y      0     4     4  0.71     0.26  0.09
## neighb_po_arrested_y           0     2     2 15.12   253.38  0.00
## neighb_po_service_y            0   999   999  0.35    -1.88  7.14
## neighb_po_service_times_y      0     4     4  1.04     1.22  0.03
## neighb_po_fam_friend_exp_y     0   999   999  0.53    -1.72  7.01
## neighb_po_fam_friend_phy_y     0     1     1  1.24    -0.47  0.02
## neighb_po_fam_friend_times_y   0     4     4  1.16     1.12  0.09
## neighb_po_exp_slur_y           0     1     1  1.13    -0.72  0.02
## neighb_po_exp_slur_times_y     0     4     4  0.99     0.60  0.09
## neighb_po_stopped_2_y          0     1     1  0.30    -1.91  0.02
## neighb_po_stopped_times_2_y    0     4     4  1.18     1.48  0.06
## neighb_po_community_y          0     4     4 -0.91     0.08  0.02
## neighb_po_fair_y               1     4     3 -0.73    -0.42  0.01
## neighb_po_respect_y            1     4     3 -0.80    -0.33  0.01
## neighb_admin                   1     3     2 -0.03     0.25  0.01
nsc_py_ss = full_join(nsc_p %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, nsc_p_ss_mean_3_items), 
                      nsc_y %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, neighborhood_crime_y))
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id, eventname)`
nsc_py_ss = nsc_py_ss %>% filter(!(eventname=="4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) %>% filter(!(eventname=="3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1"))

nsc_py_ss = reshape(nsc_py_ss, idvar="src_subject_id", timevar="eventname", direction="wide")
psych::describe(nsc_py_ss)
##                                                vars     n    mean      sd
## src_subject_id*                                   1 11868 5934.50 3426.14
## nsc_p_ss_mean_3_items.baseline_year_1_arm_1       2 11860    3.89    0.98
## neighborhood_crime_y.baseline_year_1_arm_1        3 11844    4.03    1.09
## nsc_p_ss_mean_3_items.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    4 11202    3.89    0.95
## neighborhood_crime_y.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1     5 11213    4.15    1.00
## nsc_p_ss_mean_3_items.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    6 10856    3.87    0.94
## neighborhood_crime_y.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1     7 10937    4.08    1.00
##                                                median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*                                5934.5 5934.50 4398.87   1 11868
## nsc_p_ss_mean_3_items.baseline_year_1_arm_1       4.0    4.01    0.99   1     5
## neighborhood_crime_y.baseline_year_1_arm_1        4.0    4.20    1.48   1     5
## nsc_p_ss_mean_3_items.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    4.0    4.00    0.99   1     5
## neighborhood_crime_y.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1     4.0    4.30    1.48   1     5
## nsc_p_ss_mean_3_items.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    4.0    3.97    0.99   1     5
## neighborhood_crime_y.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1     4.0    4.22    1.48   1     5
##                                                range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*                                11867  0.00    -1.20 31.45
## nsc_p_ss_mean_3_items.baseline_year_1_arm_1        4 -0.88     0.35  0.01
## neighborhood_crime_y.baseline_year_1_arm_1         4 -1.01     0.28  0.01
## nsc_p_ss_mean_3_items.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1     4 -0.87     0.38  0.01
## neighborhood_crime_y.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1      4 -1.15     0.84  0.01
## nsc_p_ss_mean_3_items.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1     4 -0.83     0.43  0.01
## neighborhood_crime_y.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1      4 -1.01     0.57  0.01
nsc_py_ss$nsc = rowMeans(nsc_py_ss[2:7], na.rm=T) # collapse across time and informant

nsc = nsc_py_ss %>% select(src_subject_id, nsc)
psych::describe(nsc)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.50 5934.50 4398.87   1 11868
## nsc                2 11865    3.97    0.70    4.11    4.04    0.66   1     5
##                 range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11867  0.00    -1.20 31.45
## nsc                 4 -0.88     0.57  0.01

DM

# discrimination
dm_y = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/culture-environment/ce_y_dm.csv")
psych::describe(dm_y) 
##                  vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*     1 26978 5732.51 3320.32   5724 5731.17 4260.99   1 11487
## eventname*          2 26978    1.76    0.74      2    1.70    1.48   1     4
## dim_yesno_q1        3 26891   43.82  181.93      0    0.00    0.00   0   999
## dim_yesno_q2        4 26891   18.37  119.83      0    0.00    0.00   0   999
## dim_yesno_q3        5 26891   37.76  171.22      0    0.00    0.00   0   999
## dim_yesno_q4        6 26891   26.03  143.01      0    0.00    0.00   0   999
## dim_matrix_q1       7 26891   28.43  145.05      1    1.00    0.00   1   999
## dim_matrix_q2       8 26891   33.25  156.38      1    1.02    0.00   1   999
## dim_matrix_q3       9 26891   24.91  135.39      1    1.17    0.00   1   999
## dim_matrix_q4      10 26891   43.69  177.89      1    1.19    0.00   1   999
## dim_matrix_q5      11 26891   26.78  141.40      1    1.00    0.00   1   999
## dim_matrix_q6      12 26891   23.84  133.56      1    1.00    0.00   1   999
## dim_matrix_q7      13 26891   25.02  136.46      1    1.01    0.00   1   999
## dim_y_ss_mean      14 26252    1.17    0.38      1    1.07    0.00   1     5
## dim_y_ss_mean_nm   15 26978    0.27    1.01      0    0.01    0.00   0     7
## dim_y_ss_mean_nt   16 26978    7.00    0.00      7    7.00    0.00   7     7
##                  range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*  11486 0.00    -1.20 20.22
## eventname*           3 0.42    -1.00  0.00
## dim_yesno_q1       999 3.95    13.77  1.11
## dim_yesno_q2       999 6.43    39.71  0.73
## dim_yesno_q3       999 4.37    17.42  1.04
## dim_yesno_q4       999 5.38    27.40  0.87
## dim_matrix_q1      998 5.16    24.90  0.88
## dim_matrix_q2      998 4.69    20.20  0.95
## dim_matrix_q3      998 5.61    29.84  0.83
## dim_matrix_q4      998 3.98    13.95  1.08
## dim_matrix_q5      998 5.37    27.21  0.86
## dim_matrix_q6      998 5.76    31.61  0.81
## dim_matrix_q7      998 5.59    29.58  0.83
## dim_y_ss_mean        4 3.55    16.22  0.00
## dim_y_ss_mean_nm     7 4.75    24.33  0.01
## dim_y_ss_mean_nt     0  NaN      NaN  0.00
# mean ; min of four items must be answered
dm_y_ss = dm_y %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, dim_y_ss_mean)
dm_y_ss = dm_y_ss %>% filter(!(eventname=="4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1")) %>% filter(!(eventname=="3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1"))
dm_y_ss = reshape(dm_y_ss, idvar="src_subject_id", timevar="eventname", direction="wide")
psych::describe(dm_y_ss)
## Warning in FUN(newX[, i], ...): no non-missing arguments to min; returning Inf
## Warning in FUN(newX[, i], ...): no non-missing arguments to max; returning -Inf
##                                        vars     n    mean      sd median
## src_subject_id*                           1 11470 5735.50 3311.25 5735.5
## dim_y_ss_mean.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    2 10884    1.18    0.39    1.0
## dim_y_ss_mean.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    3 10702    1.14    0.34    1.0
## dim_y_ss_mean.baseline_year_1_arm_1       4     0     NaN      NA     NA
##                                        trimmed     mad min     max   range skew
## src_subject_id*                        5735.50 4251.36   1 11470.0 11469.0 0.00
## dim_y_ss_mean.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    1.08    0.00   1     4.6     3.6 3.47
## dim_y_ss_mean.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    1.06    0.00   1     5.0     4.0 3.87
## dim_y_ss_mean.baseline_year_1_arm_1        NaN      NA Inf    -Inf    -Inf   NA
##                                        kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*                           -1.20 30.92
## dim_y_ss_mean.1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    15.37  0.00
## dim_y_ss_mean.2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    20.19  0.00
## dim_y_ss_mean.baseline_year_1_arm_1          NA    NA
dm_y_ss$dm = rowMeans(dm_y_ss[2:3], na.rm=T) # baseline is empty
dm = dm_y_ss %>% select(src_subject_id, dm)
psych::describe(dm)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min      max
## src_subject_id*    1 11470 5735.50 3311.25 5735.5 5735.50 4251.36   1 11470.00
## dm                 2 11399    1.17    0.32    1.0    1.09    0.00   1     4.43
##                    range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11469.00 0.00    -1.20 30.92
## dm                  3.43 3.27    14.16  0.00

External linked data

# load address info for led data
led_admin = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/linked-external-data/led_l_admin.csv")
psych::describe(led_admin) # only 11000+ people ; baseline year 1 data only
##                          vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min
## src_subject_id*             1 11134 5567.50 3214.25 5567.5 5567.50 4126.82   1
## eventname*                  2 11134    1.00    0.00    1.0    1.00    0.00   1
## reshist_addr1_percentile    3 10330   97.01   10.92  100.0  100.00    0.00   1
## reshist_addr2_percentile    4   193   78.52   30.96  100.0   83.55    0.00   1
## reshist_addr3_percentile    5    28   95.00   15.63  100.0   98.33    0.00  20
## reshist_addr1_years         6 10854    5.45    3.76    5.0    5.44    5.93   0
## reshist_addr2_years         7  1522    3.18    3.46    2.0    2.67    2.97   0
## reshist_addr3_years         8   440    1.73    2.59    1.0    1.14    1.48   0
##                            max range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*          11134 11133  0.00    -1.20 30.46
## eventname*                   1     0   NaN      NaN  0.00
## reshist_addr1_percentile   100    99 -4.14    17.73  0.11
## reshist_addr2_percentile   100    99 -0.97    -0.65  2.23
## reshist_addr3_percentile   100    80 -3.97    15.96  2.95
## reshist_addr1_years         11    11  0.06    -1.47  0.04
## reshist_addr2_years         11    11  0.98    -0.34  0.09
## reshist_addr3_years         11    11  1.91     3.12  0.12
led_admin = led_admin %>% select(src_subject_id, reshist_addr1_percentile, reshist_addr2_percentile, reshist_addr3_percentile)
led_admin$res1_wei = led_admin$reshist_addr1_percentile/100
led_admin$res2_wei = led_admin$reshist_addr2_percentile/100
led_admin$res3_wei = led_admin$reshist_addr3_percentile/100

# sanity check
hist(rowSums(led_admin[5:7], na.rm=T)) # some of these percentages dont add up to 100!!!

# so that means there is some incorrect reporting in terms of the address...
# exclude participant whose address don't add up to 100
led_admin %>% filter(rowSums(led_admin[5:7], na.rm=T)==1) %>% count() # 9414 
##      n
## 1 9414
led_admin = led_admin %>% filter(rowSums(led_admin[5:7], na.rm=T)==1)
led_admin = led_admin %>% select(src_subject_id, res1_wei, res2_wei, res3_wei)

# for those folks without an address, take their first address as being 100%
led_admin = left_join(fes %>% select(src_subject_id), led_admin)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
led_admin$res1_wei = ifelse(is.na(led_admin$res1_wei)==T, 1, led_admin$res1_wei)

Parks

# parks 
parks = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/linked-external-data/led_l_parks.csv")
psych::describe(parks)
##                                 vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed
## src_subject_id*                    1 11231 5616.00 3242.25 5616.00 5616.00
## eventname*                         2 11231    1.00    0.00    1.00    1.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_tot      3 11224    3.03    4.53    2.00    2.22
## reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_tc10*    4 11231    4.73    2.48    5.00    4.44
## reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_a_t      5 11224    0.05    0.09    0.02    0.03
## reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_cty      6 11224  662.93  733.76  437.00  512.01
## reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_tot      7  1619    2.98    4.75    2.00    2.14
## reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_tc10*    8 11231    1.53    1.59    1.00    1.07
## reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_a_t      9  1619    0.05    0.10    0.02    0.03
## reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_cty     10  1619  649.32  722.50  419.00  507.74
## reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_tot     11   472    2.73    3.75    2.00    2.06
## reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_tc10*   12 11231    1.15    0.89    1.00    1.00
## reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_a_t     13   472    0.05    0.10    0.01    0.03
## reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_cty     14   472  709.50  781.00  419.00  546.93
##                                     mad min      max    range skew kurtosis
## src_subject_id*                 4163.14   1 11231.00 11230.00 0.00    -1.20
## eventname*                         0.00   1     1.00     0.00  NaN      NaN
## reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_tot      1.48   0    95.00    95.00 6.31    70.40
## reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_tc10*    2.97   1    12.00    11.00 0.84     0.03
## reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_a_t      0.02   0     0.82     0.82 3.43    15.02
## reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_cty    394.37   0  3299.00  3299.00 2.11     3.99
## reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_tot      1.48   0    95.00    95.00 7.96   116.38
## reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_tc10*    0.00   1    12.00    11.00 3.59    13.66
## reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_a_t      0.02   0     0.81     0.81 3.81    18.37
## reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_cty    378.06   0  3299.00  3299.00 2.07     4.04
## reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_tot      1.48   0    39.00    39.00 4.72    35.82
## reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_tc10*    0.00   1    12.00    11.00 6.95    53.60
## reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_a_t      0.02   0     0.65     0.65 3.28    12.02
## reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_cty    367.68   0  2980.00  2980.00 1.92     2.94
##                                    se
## src_subject_id*                 30.59
## eventname*                       0.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_tot    0.04
## reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_tc10*  0.02
## reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_a_t    0.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_cty    6.93
## reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_tot    0.12
## reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_tc10*  0.01
## reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_a_t    0.00
## reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_cty   17.96
## reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_tot    0.17
## reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_tc10*  0.01
## reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_a_t    0.00
## reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_cty   35.95
parks = full_join(parks %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_a_t, 
                                   reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_a_t, reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_a_t), led_admin)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
parks$prop_park_res1 = parks$reshist_addr1_nanda_parks_a_t * parks$res1_wei
parks$prop_park_res2 = parks$reshist_addr2_nanda_parks_a_t * parks$res2_wei
parks$prop_park_res3 = parks$reshist_addr3_nanda_parks_a_t * parks$res3_wei

parks$prop_park_mean = rowSums(parks[9:11], na.rm=TRUE) %>%
  ifelse(rowSums(!is.na(parks[9:11])) == 0, NA, .)
parks = parks %>% select(src_subject_id, prop_park_mean)
colnames(parks) = c("src_subject_id", "parks")
# weighted mean across 3 addresses (depending on availability) of proportion of open park land within tract area 
psych::describe(parks)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed     mad min      max
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.50 5934.50 4398.87   1 11868.00
## parks              2 11224    0.05    0.09    0.02    0.03    0.02   0     0.92
##                    range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11867.00 0.00    -1.20 31.45
## parks               0.92 3.51    16.06  0.00

Comm resources

# comm resources: social services; religious/civic orgs; performing arts & sports rec
socsrv = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/linked-external-data/led_l_socsrv.csv")
psych::describe(socsrv)

## reshist_addr3_nanda_socsrv_pd     0.66  0.00    20.30    20.30  5.74    55.61

##                                    se

## reshist_addr1_nanda_socsrv_c     0.05
## reshist_addr1_nanda_socsrv_pd    0.02

## reshist_addr2_nanda_socsrv_cty  57.54

## reshist_addr3_nanda_socsrv_c     0.31

socsrv = socsrv %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname,
                           reshist_addr1_nanda_socsrv_pd, reshist_addr2_nanda_socsrv_pd,
                           reshist_addr3_nanda_socsrv_pd)
relciv = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/linked-external-data/led_l_relciv.csv")
psych::describe(relciv)

relciv = relciv %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname,
                           reshist_addr1_nanda_relorg_pd, reshist_addr2_nanda_relorg_pd, reshist_addr3_nanda_relorg_pd, # religious organizations
                           reshist_addr1_nanda_civsoc_pd, reshist_addr2_nanda_civsoc_pd, reshist_addr3_nanda_civsoc_pd) # civic/social organizations
artsports = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/linked-external-data/led_l_artsports.csv")
psych::describe(artsports)

## src_subject_id*                30.60
## eventname*                      0.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_artorg_c    0.02
## reshist_addr1_nanda_artorg_pd   0.04
## reshist_addr1_nanda_artorg_cty  0.01
## reshist_addr1_nanda_artorg_pdc  0.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_sports_c   12.05
## reshist_addr1_nanda_sports_pd   0.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_sports_cty  1.53
## reshist_addr1_nanda_sports_pdc  0.00
## reshist_addr2_nanda_artorg_c    0.05
## reshist_addr2_nanda_artorg_pd   0.01
## reshist_addr2_nanda_artorg_cty  0.02
## reshist_addr2_nanda_artorg_pdc  0.00
## reshist_addr2_nanda_sports_c   30.23
## reshist_addr2_nanda_sports_pd   0.00
## reshist_addr2_nanda_sports_cty  3.98
## reshist_addr2_nanda_sports_pdc  0.00
## reshist_addr3_nanda_artorg_c    0.12
## reshist_addr3_nanda_artorg_pd   0.03
## reshist_addr3_nanda_artorg_cty  0.04
## reshist_addr3_nanda_artorg_pdc  0.01
## reshist_addr3_nanda_sports_c   63.23
## reshist_addr3_nanda_sports_pd   0.01
## reshist_addr3_nanda_sports_cty  8.06
## reshist_addr3_nanda_sports_pdc  0.00
artsports = artsports %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname,
                                 reshist_addr1_nanda_artorg_pd, reshist_addr2_nanda_artorg_pd, reshist_addr3_nanda_artorg_pd, # arts org
                                 reshist_addr1_nanda_sports_pd, reshist_addr2_nanda_sports_pd, reshist_addr3_nanda_sports_pd) # sports org

comm_res = full_join(socsrv, relciv)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id, eventname)`
comm_res = full_join(comm_res, artsports)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id, eventname)`
comm_res = full_join(comm_res, led_admin)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
comm_res$comm_res_sum1 = comm_res$reshist_addr1_nanda_socsrv_pd + comm_res$reshist_addr1_nanda_relorg_pd +
  comm_res$reshist_addr1_nanda_civsoc_pd + comm_res$reshist_addr1_nanda_artorg_pd + comm_res$reshist_addr1_nanda_sports_pd
comm_res$comm_res_sum2 = comm_res$reshist_addr2_nanda_socsrv_pd + comm_res$reshist_addr2_nanda_relorg_pd +
  comm_res$reshist_addr2_nanda_civsoc_pd + comm_res$reshist_addr2_nanda_artorg_pd + comm_res$reshist_addr2_nanda_sports_pd
comm_res$comm_res_sum3 = comm_res$reshist_addr3_nanda_socsrv_pd + comm_res$reshist_addr3_nanda_relorg_pd +
  comm_res$reshist_addr3_nanda_civsoc_pd + comm_res$reshist_addr3_nanda_artorg_pd + comm_res$reshist_addr3_nanda_sports_pd

comm_res$comm_res_1 = comm_res$comm_res_sum1 * comm_res$res1_wei
comm_res$comm_res_2 = comm_res$comm_res_sum2 * comm_res$res2_wei
comm_res$comm_res_3 = comm_res$comm_res_sum3 * comm_res$res3_wei

comm_res$comm_res_mean = rowSums(comm_res[24:26], na.rm=T) %>%
  ifelse(rowSums(!is.na(comm_res[24:26])) == 0, NA, .)
comm_res = comm_res %>% select(src_subject_id, comm_res_mean)
colnames(comm_res) = c("src_subject_id", "comm_res")
# weighted mean across 3 addresses of the number of social services, civic/social org, arts/sports org per 1000 ppl, census tract
psych::describe(comm_res)
##                 vars     n   mean      sd  median trimmed     mad   min
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.5 3426.14 5934.50 5934.50 4398.87  1.00
## comm_res           2 11226    4.3    6.10    3.72    3.91    1.56 -1.53
##                      max range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11868.00 11867  0.00    -1.20 31.45
## comm_res          601.47   603 83.62  8164.23  0.06

Neighborhood SES

# neighborhood SES

## reshist_addr3_nanda_disadv_fac    0.07 0.01     0.58     0.56  1.59     2.02
## reshist_addr3_nanda_aff_fac       0.21 0.04     0.84     0.80  0.19    -0.82
## reshist_addr3_nanda_ethimm_fac    0.09 0.00     0.89     0.89  1.79     2.77
##                                   se
## src_subject_id*                30.59
## eventname*                      0.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_forborn_p   0.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_college_p   0.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_finc100k_p  0.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_finc75k_p   0.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_unemp_p     0.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_disadv_fac  0.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_aff_fac     0.00
## reshist_addr1_nanda_ethimm_fac  0.00
## reshist_addr2_nanda_forborn_p   0.00
## reshist_addr2_nanda_college_p   0.00
## reshist_addr2_nanda_finc100k_p  0.01
## reshist_addr2_nanda_finc75k_p   0.01
## reshist_addr2_nanda_unemp_p     0.00
## reshist_addr2_nanda_disadv_fac  0.00
## reshist_addr2_nanda_aff_fac     0.00
## reshist_addr2_nanda_ethimm_fac  0.00
## reshist_addr3_nanda_forborn_p   0.01
## reshist_addr3_nanda_college_p   0.01
## reshist_addr3_nanda_finc100k_p  0.01
## reshist_addr3_nanda_finc75k_p   0.01
## reshist_addr3_nanda_unemp_p     0.00
## reshist_addr3_nanda_disadv_fac  0.01
## reshist_addr3_nanda_aff_fac     0.01
## reshist_addr3_nanda_ethimm_fac  0.01
nbhsoc = full_join(nbhsoc %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname,
                                     reshist_addr1_nanda_disadv_fac, reshist_addr2_nanda_disadv_fac,
                                     reshist_addr3_nanda_disadv_fac), led_admin)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
nbhsoc$disadv_res1 = nbhsoc$reshist_addr1_nanda_disadv_fac * nbhsoc$res1_wei
nbhsoc$disadv_res2 = nbhsoc$reshist_addr2_nanda_disadv_fac * nbhsoc$res2_wei
nbhsoc$disadv_res3 = nbhsoc$reshist_addr3_nanda_disadv_fac * nbhsoc$res3_wei

nbhsoc$nbhdisadv_mean = rowSums(nbhsoc[9:11], na.rm=T) %>%
  ifelse(rowSums(!is.na(nbhsoc[9:11])) == 0, NA, .)
nbhsoc = nbhsoc %>% select(src_subject_id, nbhdisadv_mean)
colnames(nbhsoc) = c("src_subject_id", "nbhsoc")
# weighted mean across neighborhood disadvantage score
psych::describe(nbhsoc)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed     mad  min     max
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.50 5934.50 4398.87 1.00 11868.0
## nbhsoc             2 11225    0.11    0.11    0.08    0.09    0.06 0.01     0.8
##                   range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11867.0 0.00    -1.20 31.45
## nbhsoc              0.8 2.03     4.68  0.00

Urbanicity

# urban/rural area
urban = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/linked-external-data/led_l_urban.csv")
psych::describe(urban)
##                          vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min
## src_subject_id*             1 11186 5593.50 3229.26 5593.5 5593.50 4146.09   1
## eventname*                  2 11186    1.00    0.00    1.0    1.00    0.00   1
## reshist_addr1_urban_area    3 11186    1.21    0.58    1.0    1.02    0.00   1
## reshist_addr2_urban_area    4  1255    1.23    0.62    1.0    1.04    0.00   1
## reshist_addr3_urban_area    5   207    1.19    0.57    1.0    1.02    0.00   1
##                            max range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*          11186 11185 0.00    -1.20 30.53
## eventname*                   1     0  NaN      NaN  0.00
## reshist_addr1_urban_area     3     2 2.61     5.06  0.01
## reshist_addr2_urban_area     3     2 2.38     3.87  0.02
## reshist_addr3_urban_area     3     2 2.70     5.59  0.04
urban = full_join(urban %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, 
                                   reshist_addr1_urban_area, reshist_addr2_urban_area, 
                                   reshist_addr3_urban_area), led_admin)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
urban$urban_res1 = urban$reshist_addr1_urban_area * urban$res1_wei
urban$urban_res2 = urban$reshist_addr2_urban_area * urban$res2_wei
urban$urban_res3 = urban$reshist_addr3_urban_area * urban$res3_wei

urban$urban_mean = rowSums(urban[9:11], na.rm=T) %>%
  ifelse(rowSums(!is.na(urban[9:11])) == 0, NA, .)
urban = urban %>% select(src_subject_id, urban_mean)
colnames(urban) = c("src_subject_id", "urban")
# weighted mean across 3 addresses 
psych::describe(urban)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.5 5934.50 4398.87 1.0 11868
## urban              2 11186    1.21    0.59    1.0    1.03    0.00 0.5     6
##                   range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11867.0 0.00    -1.20 31.45
## urban               5.5 2.68     6.33  0.01

Lead risk

# lead risk
lead = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/linked-external-data/led_l_leadrisk.csv")
psych::describe(lead)
##                                vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed
## src_subject_id*                   1 11214 5607.50 3237.35 5607.50 5607.50
## eventname*                        2 11214    1.00    0.00    1.00    1.00
## reshist_addr1_leadrisk_poverty    3 11214   18.93   15.20   14.18   16.69
## reshist_addr2_leadrisk_poverty    4  1254   19.78   15.18   14.93   17.67
## reshist_addr3_leadrisk_poverty    5   207   20.66   15.69   16.88   18.53
## reshist_addr1_leadrisk_housing    6 11214   20.91   16.07   16.43   19.22
## reshist_addr2_leadrisk_housing    7  1254   20.01   15.88   14.93   18.19
## reshist_addr3_leadrisk_housing    8   207   22.12   16.81   17.06   20.56
## reshist_addr1_leadrisk            9 11214    5.10    3.11    5.00    5.01
## reshist_addr2_leadrisk           10  1254    5.04    3.09    5.00    4.93
## reshist_addr3_leadrisk           11   207    5.39    3.11    5.00    5.37
##                                    mad  min      max    range skew kurtosis
## src_subject_id*                4156.47 1.00 11214.00 11213.00 0.00    -1.20
## eventname*                        0.00 1.00     1.00     0.00  NaN      NaN
## reshist_addr1_leadrisk_poverty   11.76 0.00    93.84    93.84 1.34     1.68
## reshist_addr2_leadrisk_poverty   12.35 0.43    85.58    85.15 1.29     1.59
## reshist_addr3_leadrisk_poverty   13.15 1.00    76.47    75.47 1.24     1.29
## reshist_addr1_leadrisk_housing   15.99 0.05    64.54    64.49 0.73    -0.58
## reshist_addr2_leadrisk_housing   14.81 0.05    63.62    63.58 0.82    -0.40
## reshist_addr3_leadrisk_housing   16.36 0.41    61.73    61.32 0.69    -0.78
## reshist_addr1_leadrisk            4.45 1.00    10.00     9.00 0.21    -1.35
## reshist_addr2_leadrisk            4.45 1.00    10.00     9.00 0.25    -1.30
## reshist_addr3_leadrisk            4.45 1.00    10.00     9.00 0.13    -1.40
##                                   se
## src_subject_id*                30.57
## eventname*                      0.00
## reshist_addr1_leadrisk_poverty  0.14
## reshist_addr2_leadrisk_poverty  0.43
## reshist_addr3_leadrisk_poverty  1.09
## reshist_addr1_leadrisk_housing  0.15
## reshist_addr2_leadrisk_housing  0.45
## reshist_addr3_leadrisk_housing  1.17
## reshist_addr1_leadrisk          0.03
## reshist_addr2_leadrisk          0.09
## reshist_addr3_leadrisk          0.22
lead = full_join(lead %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, 
                                 reshist_addr1_leadrisk, reshist_addr2_leadrisk, 
                                 reshist_addr3_leadrisk), led_admin)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
lead$lead_res1 = lead$reshist_addr1_leadrisk * lead$res1_wei
lead$lead_res2 = lead$reshist_addr2_leadrisk * lead$res2_wei
lead$lead_res3 = lead$reshist_addr3_leadrisk * lead$res3_wei

lead$lead_mean = rowSums(lead[9:11], na.rm=T) %>%
  ifelse(rowSums(!is.na(lead[9:11])) == 0, NA, .)
lead = lead %>% select(src_subject_id, lead_mean)
colnames(lead) = c("src_subject_id", "lead")
# weighted mean across 3 addresses of estimated lead risk of residential address
psych::describe(lead)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.5 5934.50 4398.87   1 11868
## lead               2 11214    5.13    3.16    5.0    5.02    4.45   1    20
##                 range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11867 0.00    -1.20 31.45
## lead               19 0.33    -0.78  0.03

PM2.5

# air pollution (PM2.5)
pm25 = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/linked-external-data/led_l_pm25.csv")
psych::describe(pm25)
##                                vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed
## src_subject_id*                   1 11219 5610.00 3238.79 5610.00 5610.00
## eventname*                        2 11219    1.00    0.00    1.00    1.00

## reshist_addr2_pm252016aa          4  1255    7.65    1.60    7.79    7.67
## reshist_addr3_pm252016aa          5   207    7.58    1.50    7.78    7.67
## reshist_addr1_pm25_2016_max       6 10780   39.95   27.55   27.76   35.27
## reshist_addr2_pm25_2016_max       7  1259   38.25   26.00   27.54   33.62
## reshist_addr3_pm25_2016_max       8   207   35.69   25.49   26.53   30.51
## reshist_addr1_pm25_2016daysepa    9 10780    1.27    4.39    0.00    0.59
## reshist_addr2_pm25_2016daysepa   10  1259    1.61   13.47    0.00    0.48
## reshist_addr3_pm25_2016daysepa   11   207    1.22    2.76    0.00    0.44
## reshist_addr1_pm25_2016_min      12 10780    1.00    0.75    0.79    0.90
## reshist_addr2_pm25_2016_min      13  1259    1.04    1.08    0.81    0.92
## reshist_addr3_pm25_2016_min      14   207    0.90    0.65    0.76    0.82
##                                    mad   min      max    range  skew kurtosis
## src_subject_id*                4158.69  1.00 11219.00 11218.00  0.00    -1.20
## eventname*                        0.00  1.00     1.00     0.00   NaN      NaN
## reshist_addr1_pm252016aa          1.50  1.72    15.90    14.18  0.13     0.65
## reshist_addr2_pm252016aa          1.55  2.31    13.69    11.38 -0.11     0.57
## reshist_addr3_pm252016aa          1.46  3.48    11.04     7.56 -0.55     0.08
## reshist_addr1_pm25_2016_max      10.49  5.65   199.32   193.67  1.57     2.06
## reshist_addr2_pm25_2016_max       9.90  8.57   188.80   180.22  1.63     2.10
## reshist_addr3_pm25_2016_max       8.90 10.26   191.99   181.73  2.37     7.23
## reshist_addr1_pm25_2016daysepa    0.00  0.00   334.00   334.00 46.41  3276.62
## reshist_addr2_pm25_2016daysepa    0.00  0.00   334.00   334.00 23.89   586.18
## reshist_addr3_pm25_2016daysepa    0.00  0.00    11.00    11.00  2.44     4.87
## reshist_addr1_pm25_2016_min       0.63  0.00    20.61    20.61  2.72    43.34
## reshist_addr2_pm25_2016_min       0.64  0.00    20.61    20.61  9.80   169.72
## reshist_addr3_pm25_2016_min       0.57  0.01     3.48     3.48  1.20     1.51
##                                   se
## src_subject_id*                30.58
## eventname*                      0.00
## reshist_addr1_pm252016aa        0.01
## reshist_addr2_pm252016aa        0.05
## reshist_addr3_pm252016aa        0.10
## reshist_addr1_pm25_2016_max     0.27
## reshist_addr2_pm25_2016_max     0.73
## reshist_addr3_pm25_2016_max     1.77
## reshist_addr1_pm25_2016daysepa  0.04
## reshist_addr2_pm25_2016daysepa  0.38
## reshist_addr3_pm25_2016daysepa  0.19
## reshist_addr1_pm25_2016_min     0.01
## reshist_addr2_pm25_2016_min     0.03
## reshist_addr3_pm25_2016_min     0.05
pm25 = full_join(pm25 %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, 
                                 reshist_addr1_pm252016aa, reshist_addr2_pm252016aa, 
                                 reshist_addr3_pm252016aa), led_admin)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
pm25$pm25_res1 = pm25$reshist_addr1_pm252016aa * pm25$res1_wei
pm25$pm25_res2 = pm25$reshist_addr2_pm252016aa * pm25$res2_wei
pm25$pm25_res3 = pm25$reshist_addr3_pm252016aa * pm25$res3_wei

pm25$pm25_mean = rowSums(pm25[9:11], na.rm=T) %>%
  ifelse(rowSums(!is.na(pm25[9:11])) == 0, NA, .)
pm25 = pm25 %>% select(src_subject_id, pm25_mean)
colnames(pm25) = c("src_subject_id", "pm25")
# weighted mean across 3 addy of annual average of PM2.5 in 2016
psych::describe(pm25)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed     mad  min
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.50 5934.50 4398.87 1.00
## pm25               2 11216    7.71    1.70    7.75    7.66    1.51 1.72
##                      max    range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11868.00 11867.00 0.00    -1.20 31.45
## pm25               23.77    22.04 1.03     6.33  0.02

ADI

# area deprivation index -- higher is more deprivation
adi = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/linked-external-data/led_l_adi.csv")
psych::describe(adi)
##                          vars     n      mean        sd    median   trimmed
## src_subject_id              1 11215   5608.00   3237.64   5608.00   5608.00
## eventname                   2 11215      1.00      0.00      1.00      1.00

## eventname                    0.00

## reshist_addr2_adi_work_c     0.13
## reshist_addr2_adi_income   973.85
## reshist_addr2_adi_in_dis     0.04
## reshist_addr2_adi_home_v  5024.00
## reshist_addr2_adi_rent      10.32
## reshist_addr2_adi_mortg     16.39
## reshist_addr2_adi_home_o     0.65
## reshist_addr2_adi_crowd      0.16
## reshist_addr2_adi_unemp      0.17
## reshist_addr2_adi_pov        0.34
## reshist_addr2_adi_b138       0.46
## reshist_addr2_adi_sp         0.37
## reshist_addr2_adi_ncar       0.34
## reshist_addr2_adi_ntel       0.07
## reshist_addr2_adi_nplumb     0.02
## reshist_addr2_adi_wsum       0.58
## reshist_addr2_adi_perc       0.77
## reshist_addr3_adi_edu_l      0.46
## reshist_addr3_adi_edu_h      0.80
## reshist_addr3_adi_work_c     0.37
## reshist_addr3_adi_income  2350.47
## reshist_addr3_adi_in_dis     0.09
## reshist_addr3_adi_home_v 13247.95
## reshist_addr3_adi_rent      25.68
## reshist_addr3_adi_mortg     41.96
## reshist_addr3_adi_home_o     1.68
## reshist_addr3_adi_crowd      0.35
## reshist_addr3_adi_unemp      0.42
## reshist_addr3_adi_pov        0.89
## reshist_addr3_adi_b138       1.17
## reshist_addr3_adi_sp         0.99
## reshist_addr3_adi_ncar       1.02
## reshist_addr3_adi_ntel       0.16
## reshist_addr3_adi_nplumb     0.06
## reshist_addr3_adi_wsum       1.50
## reshist_addr3_adi_perc       1.94
adi = full_join(adi %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, 
                               reshist_addr1_adi_wsum, reshist_addr2_adi_wsum, 
                               reshist_addr3_adi_wsum), led_admin)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
adi$adi_res1 = adi$reshist_addr1_adi_wsum * adi$res1_wei
adi$adi_res2 = adi$reshist_addr2_adi_wsum * adi$res2_wei
adi$adi_res3 = adi$reshist_addr3_adi_wsum * adi$res3_wei

adi$adi_sum = rowSums(adi[9:11], na.rm=T) %>%
  ifelse(rowSums(!is.na(adi[9:11])) == 0, NA, .)
adi = adi %>% select(src_subject_id, adi_sum)
colnames(adi) = c("src_subject_id", "adi")
# weighted across 3 addy; scaled weighted sum of adi based on Kind et al., 2014
psych::describe(adi)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed     mad  min
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.50 5934.50 4398.87 1.00
## adi                2 10990   95.15   22.69   98.85   97.85   15.16 1.07
##                      max    range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11868.00 11867.00  0.00    -1.20 31.45
## adi               247.43   246.36 -0.84     6.36  0.22

COI

# child opportunity index
coi = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/linked-external-data/led_l_coi.csv")
psych::describe(coi) # three domains: education, health/environment, social/economic

## reshist_addr3_coi_zed_reading      0.02    0.12
## reshist_addr3_coi_zed_schpov      -1.06    0.07

## reshist_addr3_coi_zed_prxece       0.85    0.05
## reshist_addr3_coi_zed_prxhqece     3.66    0.05
## reshist_addr3_coi_zhe_food         4.65    0.09
## reshist_addr3_coi_zhe_green       -0.95    0.07
## reshist_addr3_coi_zhe_heat         1.34    0.04
## reshist_addr3_coi_zhe_hlthins      2.00    0.05
## reshist_addr3_coi_zhe_ozone        0.60    0.07
## reshist_addr3_coi_zhe_pm25        -0.24    0.07
## reshist_addr3_coi_zhe_vacancy      0.72    0.07
## reshist_addr3_coi_zhe_walk        -1.30    0.07
## reshist_addr3_coi_zhe_suprfnd      8.31    0.07
## reshist_addr3_coi_zhe_rsei         1.53    0.07
## reshist_addr3_coi_zse_povrate      1.74    0.07
## reshist_addr3_coi_zse_public       0.58    0.09
## reshist_addr3_coi_zse_home        -0.96    0.08
## reshist_addr3_coi_zse_occ         -0.80    0.07
## reshist_addr3_coi_zse_mhe          1.96    0.07
## reshist_addr3_coi_zse_emprat       1.37    0.06
## reshist_addr3_coi_zse_jobprox      2.46    0.07
## reshist_addr3_coi_zse_single      -0.32    0.08
## reshist_addr3_coi_zse_ecres       -0.30    0.08
## reshist_addr1_coi_z_ed_nat        -0.56    0.00
## reshist_addr1_coi_z_he_nat         0.91    0.00
## reshist_addr1_coi_z_se_nat         0.62    0.00
coi = full_join(coi %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, # just grabbing the z-score of nationally normed coi here
                               reshist_addr1_coi_r_ed_nat, reshist_addr2_coi_r_ed_nat, reshist_addr3_coi_r_ed_nat, # education coi
                               reshist_addr1_coi_r_he_nat, reshist_addr2_coi_r_he_nat, reshist_addr3_coi_r_he_nat, # health coi
                               reshist_addr1_coi_r_se_nat, reshist_addr2_coi_r_se_nat, reshist_addr3_coi_r_se_nat), # soc/econ coi
                led_admin)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
coi$coi_ed_res1 = coi$reshist_addr1_coi_r_ed_nat * coi$res1_wei
coi$coi_ed_res2 = coi$reshist_addr2_coi_r_ed_nat * coi$res2_wei
coi$coi_ed_res3 = coi$reshist_addr3_coi_r_ed_nat * coi$res3_wei
coi$coi_he_res1 = coi$reshist_addr1_coi_r_he_nat * coi$res1_wei
coi$coi_he_res2 = coi$reshist_addr2_coi_r_he_nat * coi$res2_wei
coi$coi_he_res3 = coi$reshist_addr3_coi_r_he_nat * coi$res3_wei
coi$coi_se_res1 = coi$reshist_addr1_coi_r_se_nat * coi$res1_wei
coi$coi_se_res2 = coi$reshist_addr2_coi_r_se_nat * coi$res2_wei
coi$coi_se_res3 = coi$reshist_addr3_coi_r_se_nat * coi$res3_wei

coi$coi_ed_sum = rowSums(coi[15:17], na.rm=T) %>%
  ifelse(rowSums(!is.na(coi[15:17])) == 0, NA, .) # account for na if any res is missing
coi$coi_he_sum = rowSums(coi[18:20], na.rm=T) %>%
  ifelse(rowSums(!is.na(coi[18:20])) == 0, NA, .) 
coi$coi_se_sum = rowSums(coi[21:23], na.rm=T) %>%
  ifelse(rowSums(!is.na(coi[21:23])) == 0, NA, .)
coi = coi %>% select(src_subject_id, coi_ed_sum, coi_he_sum, coi_se_sum)
colnames(coi) = c("src_subject_id", "coi_ed", "coi_he", "coi_se")
psych::describe(coi)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.5 5934.50 4398.87   1 11868
## coi_ed             2 10775   60.54   30.16   67.0   62.44   32.62   1   198
## coi_he             3 10775   58.64   30.48   63.0   60.14   37.06   1   200
## coi_se             4 10775   59.47   31.22   66.0   61.14   37.06   1   196
##                 range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11867  0.00    -1.20 31.45
## coi_ed            197 -0.39    -0.67  0.29
## coi_he            199 -0.28    -0.86  0.29
## coi_se            195 -0.30    -0.85  0.30

Trauma

### ksads data for questions on trauma
ksads = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/mental-health/mh_p_ksads_ptsd.csv")
ksads_max = ksads %>%
  group_by(src_subject_id) %>% # find max across time for each question, per person
  summarise(across(starts_with("ksads_ptsd_raw"), ~ max(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .names = "max_{.col}"))
ksads_max$ksads_ptsd = rowSums(ksads_max[2:18], na.rm=T)

ksads_ptsd = ksads_max %>% select(src_subject_id, ksads_ptsd)
psych::describe(ksads_ptsd)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed    mad min   max
## src_subject_id*    1 11840 5920.50 3418.06 5920.5 5920.50 4388.5   1 11840
## ksads_ptsd         2 11840    0.72    1.07    0.0    0.54    0.0   0    17
##                 range skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id* 11839 0.00    -1.20 31.41
## ksads_ptsd         17 4.64    52.98  0.01

Merge and create df

# create df with variable for merge
df_list = list(lec, dm, ksads_ptsd, # self
               crpbi, pm, abcl, asr, # parent
               fes, macv, # fam
               pbp, pnh, srpf, peq, # school/peer
               comc, parks, comm_res, nsc, nbhsoc, # comm
               urban, lead, pm25, adi, coi) # neighborhood
env_master = df_list %>% reduce(full_join, by=join_by("src_subject_id"))
psych::describe(env_master)
##                 vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed     mad   min
## src_subject_id*    1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.50 5934.50 4398.87  1.00

## pnh                27.00    27.00  0.08    -1.14  0.08
## srpf               12.00     7.75 -0.66     0.55  0.01
## peq                15.00    12.00  2.23     7.30  0.01
## comc                5.00     4.00 -0.57     0.28  0.01
## parks               0.92     0.92  3.51    16.06  0.00
## comm_res          601.47   603.00 83.62  8164.23  0.06
## nsc                 5.00     4.00 -0.88     0.57  0.01
## nbhsoc              0.80     0.80  2.03     4.68  0.00
## urban               6.00     5.50  2.68     6.33  0.01
## lead               20.00    19.00  0.33    -0.78  0.03
## pm25               23.77    22.04  1.03     6.33  0.02
## adi               247.43   246.36 -0.84     6.36  0.22
## coi_ed            198.00   197.00 -0.39    -0.67  0.29
## coi_he            200.00   199.00 -0.28    -0.86  0.29
## coi_se            196.00   195.00 -0.30    -0.85  0.30
# exclude participants with fewer than 50% data (more than 50% of the variables missing)
env_master$na_rows = rowSums(is.na(env_master))
env_master %>% filter(na_rows > 15) %>% summarise(n = n()) # n=96
##    n
## 1 96
env_master = env_master %>% filter(!(na_rows > 15))
env_master$na_rows = NULL

#################################################################################

# plot histogram of each variable
env_master %>% 
  select(2:30) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 7, color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_x") + theme_bw()
## Warning: Removed 17587 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_bin()`).

Include demo data

# include demo info
demo = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/abcd-general/abcd_p_demo.csv")
psych::describe(demo)

## demo_nat_lang_3_yrs_eng_p___2     1.00   0.13    -1.98  0.01
## demo_nat_lang_3_yrs_eng_p___3     1.00  -0.06    -2.00  0.01
## demo_nat_lang_3_yrs_eng_p___4     1.00  -0.15    -1.98  0.01
## demo_nat_lang_3_yrs_eng_p___5     1.00  -0.18    -1.97  0.01
## demo_nat_lang_3_yrs_eng_p___6     1.00  -0.14    -1.98  0.01
## race_ethnicity                    4.00   1.08     0.00  0.01
## acs_raked_propensity_score     2665.93   1.10     1.58  2.90
# demo_prim = who is the reporter (parent) - baseline_year_1_arm_1 ; 1=mom, 2=dad, 3=adopt parent, 4=custodial parent, 5=other
# demo_sex_v2 = child's sex at birth
# race_ethnicity = composite var of race/ethnicity
# two combined income vars: demo_comb_income_v2; demo_comb_income_v2_l; the first one is baseline only -- pick this 
demo_select = demo %>% 
  filter(eventname=="baseline_year_1_arm_1") %>%
  select(src_subject_id, demo_sex_v2, race_ethnicity, demo_comb_income_v2, demo_prnt_ed_v2)

psych::describe(demo_select) # change some vars to NA
##                     vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad min   max
## src_subject_id*        1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.5 5934.50 4398.87   1 11868
## demo_sex_v2            2 11868    1.48    0.50    1.0    1.47    0.00   1     3
## race_ethnicity         3 11866    2.04    1.32    1.0    1.80    0.00   1     5
## demo_comb_income_v2    4 11866   82.50  248.28    8.0    7.83    1.48   1   999
## demo_prnt_ed_v2        5 11868   17.68   28.89   18.0   16.90    1.48   1   777
##                     range  skew kurtosis    se
## src_subject_id*     11867  0.00    -1.20 31.45
## demo_sex_v2             2  0.09    -1.98  0.00
## race_ethnicity          4  1.07    -0.02  0.01
## demo_comb_income_v2   998  3.05     7.53  2.28
## demo_prnt_ed_v2       776 26.00   680.28  0.27
demo_select[demo_select=="999"] = NA
demo_select[demo_select=="777"] = NA

# merge with env_master
env_master_full = left_join(env_master, demo_select)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`

Include other covars

# some other covars
motion = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/imaging/mri_y_qc_motion.csv")
mriinfo = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/imaging/mri_y_adm_info.csv")
otherdemo = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/abcd-general/abcd_y_lt.csv")

age = read.csv("./abcd_5.1_y_age_corrected.csv") %>% select(src_subject_id, eventname, interview_age) %>%
  filter(!eventname=="4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1") %>% filter(!eventname=="42_month_follow_up_arm_1") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = eventname, values_from = "interview_age") %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0("age_", .), -src_subject_id)
age$changeage_from30mo_to3yr = age$age_3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 - age$age_30_month_follow_up_arm_1
age$changeage_from2yr_to30mo = age$age_30_month_follow_up_arm_1 - age$age_2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1
age$changeage_from18mo_to2yr = age$age_2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 - age$age_18_month_follow_up_arm_1
age$changeage_from1yr_to18mo = age$age_18_month_follow_up_arm_1 - age$age_1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1
age$changeage_from6mo_to1yr = age$age_1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 - age$age_6_month_follow_up_arm_1
age$changeage_frombase_to6mo = age$age_6_month_follow_up_arm_1 - age$age_baseline_year_1_arm_1
age$changeage_frombase_to2yr = age$age_2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 - age$age_baseline_year_1_arm_1
  
# exclude incorrect ages
age = age %>%
  mutate(
    age_3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 = ifelse(changeage_from30mo_to3yr < 1, NA, age_3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1),
    age_30_month_follow_up_arm_1 = ifelse(changeage_from2yr_to30mo < 1, NA, age_30_month_follow_up_arm_1),
    age_2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 = ifelse(changeage_from18mo_to2yr < 1, NA, age_2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1),
    age_18_month_follow_up_arm_1 = ifelse(changeage_from1yr_to18mo < 1, NA, age_18_month_follow_up_arm_1),
    age_1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 = ifelse(changeage_from6mo_to1yr < 1, NA, age_1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1),
    age_6_month_follow_up_arm_1 = ifelse(changeage_frombase_to6mo < 1, NA, age_6_month_follow_up_arm_1))

# recompute change age 
age$changeage_from30mo_to3yr = age$age_3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 - age$age_30_month_follow_up_arm_1
age$changeage_from2yr_to30mo = age$age_30_month_follow_up_arm_1 - age$age_2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1
age$changeage_from18mo_to2yr = age$age_2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 - age$age_18_month_follow_up_arm_1
age$changeage_from1yr_to18mo = age$age_18_month_follow_up_arm_1 - age$age_1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1
age$changeage_from6mo_to1yr = age$age_1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 - age$age_6_month_follow_up_arm_1
age$changeage_frombase_to6mo = age$age_6_month_follow_up_arm_1 - age$age_baseline_year_1_arm_1
age$changeage_frombase_to2yr = age$age_2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 - age$age_baseline_year_1_arm_1

# create change age for growth curve
age$changeage_from6mo_to18mo = age$age_18_month_follow_up_arm_1 - age$age_6_month_follow_up_arm_1
age$changeage_from6mo_to2yr = age$age_2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 - age$age_6_month_follow_up_arm_1
age$changeage_from6mo_to30mo = age$age_30_month_follow_up_arm_1 - age$age_6_month_follow_up_arm_1
age$changeage_from6mo_to3yr = age$age_3_year_follow_up_y_arm_1 - age$age_6_month_follow_up_arm_1

# convert age to years (instead of months)
describe(age)
##                              vars     n    mean      sd median trimmed     mad
## src_subject_id*                 1 11868 5934.50 3426.14 5934.5 5934.50 4398.87
## age_baseline_year_1_arm_1       2 11867  118.98    7.50  119.0  118.87   10.38
## age_6_month_follow_up_arm_1     3 11388  124.77    7.57  125.0  124.68   10.38
## age_1_year_follow_up_y_arm_1    4 10946  131.08    7.72  131.0  131.00   10.38

## changeage_from6mo_to30mo      13    35    22 0.63     1.71  0.02
## changeage_from6mo_to3yr       22    42    20 0.46     0.41  0.02
age[2:19] = age[2:19] / 12

psych::describe(age)
##                              vars     n    mean      sd  median trimmed     mad

## changeage_from6mo_to3yr       1.83     3.50     1.67 0.46     0.41  0.00
puberty = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/physical-health/ph_p_pds.csv") %>% 
  select(src_subject_id, eventname, pds_p_ss_male_category, pds_p_ss_female_category) %>% 
  filter(eventname=="baseline_year_1_arm_1" | eventname=="2_year_follow_up_y_arm_1") %>% # the 2yr data only has 666
  pivot_wider(names_from = eventname, values_from = c(pds_p_ss_male_category, pds_p_ss_female_category))
colnames(puberty) = c("src_subject_id", "pub_m_base", "pub_m_2yr", "pub_fem_base", "pub_fem_2yr")
puberty$pub_base = ifelse(is.na(puberty$pub_m_base)==T, puberty$pub_fem_base, puberty$pub_m_base)
puberty$pub_2yr = ifelse(is.na(puberty$pub_m_2yr)==T, puberty$pub_fem_2yr, puberty$pub_m_2yr)
puberty$pub_change = puberty$pub_2yr - puberty$pub_base

weights = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/abcd-general/abcd_p_demo.csv") %>% 
  select(src_subject_id, eventname, acs_raked_propensity_score) %>% filter(eventname=="baseline_year_1_arm_1")
weights$weights = ((weights$acs_raked_propensity_score - min(weights$acs_raked_propensity_score)) / 
                      (max(weights$acs_raked_propensity_score) - min(weights$acs_raked_propensity_score)))

othercovars = left_join(weights, motion %>% filter(eventname=="baseline_year_1_arm_1") %>% select(src_subject_id, rsfmri_meanmotion))
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
othercovars = left_join(othercovars, mriinfo %>% filter(eventname=="baseline_year_1_arm_1") %>% select(src_subject_id, mri_info_manufacturer))
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
othercovars = left_join(othercovars, otherdemo %>% filter(eventname=="baseline_year_1_arm_1") %>% select(src_subject_id, site_id_l, rel_family_id))
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
othercovars = left_join(othercovars, age)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
othercovars = left_join(othercovars, puberty %>% select(src_subject_id, pub_base, pub_2yr, pub_change))
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
env_master_full = left_join(env_master_full, othercovars)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`

Mental health outcomes

bpm = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/mental-health/mh_y_bpm.csv")

bpm_select = bpm %>%  
  filter(!eventname=="4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1") %>%
  filter(!eventname=="42_month_follow_up_arm_1") %>%
  select(src_subject_id, eventname, bpm_y_scr_internal_r, bpm_y_scr_external_r, bpm_y_scr_totalprob_r) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "eventname", values_from = c(bpm_y_scr_internal_r, bpm_y_scr_external_r, bpm_y_scr_totalprob_r))
psych::describe(bpm_select) # we have 6mo, 1yr, 18mo, 2yr, 30mo data

# merge into main dataset
env_master_full = left_join(env_master_full, bpm_select)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`

rsFMRI data

rsfmri_gp = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/imaging/mri_y_rsfmr_cor_gp_gp.csv")
rsfmri_incl = read.csv("../abcd-data-release-5.0/core/imaging/mri_y_qc_incl.csv") %>% 
  select(src_subject_id, eventname, imgincl_rsfmri_include) 

rsfmri_gp_incl = left_join(rsfmri_gp, rsfmri_incl)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id, eventname)`
rsfmri_gp_incl = rsfmri_gp_incl %>% filter(imgincl_rsfmri_include==1)

rsfmri_gp_select = rsfmri_gp_incl %>% 
  filter(!eventname=="4_year_follow_up_y_arm_1") %>% # too many missing data
  select(src_subject_id, eventname, 
         rsfmri_c_ngd_cgc_ngd_cgc, rsfmri_c_ngd_dt_ngd_dt, rsfmri_c_ngd_fo_ngd_fo, rsfmri_c_ngd_sa_ngd_sa, # within con, dmn, fpn, sal
         rsfmri_c_ngd_cgc_ngd_dt, rsfmri_c_ngd_cgc_ngd_fo, rsfmri_c_ngd_cgc_ngd_sa, # between con-dmn, con-fpn, con-sal, 
         rsfmri_c_ngd_dt_ngd_fo, rsfmri_c_ngd_sa_ngd_dt, rsfmri_c_ngd_sa_ngd_fo) %>% # between dmn-fpn, dmn-sal, fpn-sal
  distinct(src_subject_id, eventname, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  rename(
    "con_con" = rsfmri_c_ngd_cgc_ngd_cgc, "dmn_dmn" = rsfmri_c_ngd_dt_ngd_dt, "fpn_fpn" = rsfmri_c_ngd_fo_ngd_fo, "sn_sn" = rsfmri_c_ngd_sa_ngd_sa,
    "con_dmn" = rsfmri_c_ngd_cgc_ngd_dt, "con_fpn" = rsfmri_c_ngd_cgc_ngd_fo, "con_sn" = rsfmri_c_ngd_cgc_ngd_sa, 
    "dmn_fpn" = rsfmri_c_ngd_dt_ngd_fo, "sn_dmn" = rsfmri_c_ngd_sa_ngd_dt, "sn_fpn" = rsfmri_c_ngd_sa_ngd_fo)

## compute number of nodes for each pairs
nodes_dmn = 41
nodes_sn = 4
nodes_fpn = 24
nodes_con = 40
# create a between-network adjacency matrix (assuming all possible edges exist)
dmn_sn = sum(matrix(1, nrow = nodes_dmn, ncol = nodes_sn))  # 1 indicates an edge, 0 indicates no edge
sn_fpn = sum(matrix(1, nrow = nodes_sn, ncol = nodes_fpn))  # 1 indicates an edge, 0 indicates no edge
sn_sn = sum(matrix(1, nrow = nodes_sn, ncol = nodes_sn))  # 1 indicates an edge, 0 indicates no edge
con_dmn = sum(matrix(1, nrow = nodes_con, ncol = nodes_dmn))  # 1 indicates an edge, 0 indicates no edge
con_fpn = sum(matrix(1, nrow = nodes_con, ncol = nodes_fpn))  # 1 indicates an edge, 0 indicates no edge
con_con = sum(matrix(1, nrow = nodes_con, ncol = nodes_con))  # 1 indicates an edge, 0 indicates no edge

rsfmri_gp_select$sal_sal = ((rsfmri_gp_select$con_con * con_con) + (rsfmri_gp_select$sn_sn * sn_sn)) / (con_con + sn_sn)
rsfmri_gp_select$dmn_sal = ((rsfmri_gp_select$con_dmn * con_dmn) + (rsfmri_gp_select$sn_dmn * dmn_sn)) / (con_con + dmn_sn)
rsfmri_gp_select$sal_fpn = ((rsfmri_gp_select$con_fpn * con_fpn) + (rsfmri_gp_select$sn_fpn * sn_fpn)) / (con_fpn + sn_fpn)

rsfmri_gp_select = rsfmri_gp_select %>%
  select(src_subject_id, eventname, 
         dmn_dmn, sal_sal, fpn_fpn, dmn_sal, dmn_fpn, sal_fpn) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "eventname", 
              values_from = c(dmn_dmn, fpn_fpn, sal_sal, dmn_sal, dmn_fpn, sal_fpn))

# merge with env_master and env_master_full
env_master_full_wbrain = left_join(env_master_full, rsfmri_gp_select)
## Joining with `by = join_by(src_subject_id)`
